(** **********************************************************

Contents :

- Definition of adjunction
- Construction of an adjunction from some partial data (Theorem 2 (iv) of Chapter IV.1 of
      MacLane)
- Post-composition with a left adjoint is a left adjoint ([is_left_adjoint_post_composition_functor])
- Lemmas about adjunctions

************************************************************)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.SplitMonicsAndEpis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * Adjunctions *)
Section adjunctions.

Definition adjunction_data (A B : category) : UU
  := ∑ (F : functor A B) (G : functor B A),
     nat_trans (functor_identity A) (F ∙ G) ×
               nat_trans (G ∙ F) (functor_identity B).

Definition make_adjunction_data {A B : category}
           (F : functor A B)
           (G : functor B A)
           (η : functor_identity _ ⟹ (F ∙ G))
           (ε : (G ∙ F) ⟹ functor_identity _) : adjunction_data A B
  := (F ,, G ,, (η ,, ε)).

Definition left_functor {A B} (X : adjunction_data A B) : functor A B
  := pr1 X.

Definition right_functor {A B} (X : adjunction_data A B) : functor B A
  := pr1 (pr2 X).

Definition adjunit {A B} (X : adjunction_data A B)
  : nat_trans (functor_identity _) (_ ∙ _)
  := pr1 (pr2 (pr2 X)).

Definition adjcounit {A B} (X : adjunction_data A B)
  : nat_trans (_ ∙ _ ) (functor_identity _)
  := pr2 (pr2 (pr2 X)).

Definition triangle_1_statement {A B : category} (X : adjunction_data A B)
           (F := left_functor X) (η := adjunit X) (ε := adjcounit X)
  : UU
  :=  ∏ a : A, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a).

Definition triangle_2_statement {A B : category} (X : adjunction_data A B)
           (G := right_functor X) (η := adjunit X) (ε := adjcounit X)
  : UU
  := ∏ b : B, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b).

Definition form_adjunction' {A B} (X : adjunction_data A B) : UU
  := triangle_1_statement X × triangle_2_statement X.

Definition form_adjunction {A B : category} (F : functor A B) (G : functor B A)
             (eta : nat_trans (functor_identity A) (functor_composite F G))
             (eps : nat_trans (functor_composite G F) (functor_identity B)) : UU :=
  form_adjunction' (F,,G,,eta,,eps).


A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
isaprop (form_adjunction F G eta eps)


A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
isaprop (form_adjunction F G eta eps)

  
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
t: A
isaprop
  (# (left_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps))
     (adjunit (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t)
   · adjcounit (F,, G,, eta,, eps)
       (left_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t) =
   identity (left_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t))
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
t: B
isaprop
  (adjunit (F,, G,, eta,, eps)
     (right_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t)
   · # (right_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps))
       (adjcounit (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t) =
   identity (right_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t))

  
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
t: A
isaprop
  (# (left_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps))
     (adjunit (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t)
   · adjcounit (F,, G,, eta,, eps)
       (left_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t) =
   identity (left_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t))
 apply B.
  
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
t: B
isaprop
  (adjunit (F,, G,, eta,, eps)
     (right_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t)
   · # (right_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps))
       (adjcounit (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t) =
   identity (right_functor (F,, G,, eta,, eps) t))
 apply A.
Defined.

Definition make_form_adjunction {A B : category} {F : functor A B} {G : functor B A}
           {eta : nat_trans (functor_identity A) (functor_composite F G)}
           {eps : nat_trans (functor_composite G F) (functor_identity B)}
           (H1 : ∏ a : A, # F (eta a) · eps (F a) = identity (F a))
           (H2 : ∏ b : B, eta (G b) · # G (eps b) = identity (G b)) :
  form_adjunction F G eta eps := (H1,,H2).

  Definition are_adjoints {A B : category} (F : functor A B) (G : functor B A) : UU :=
    ∑ (etaeps : (nat_trans (functor_identity A) (functor_composite F G))
                  × (nat_trans (functor_composite G F) (functor_identity B))),
    form_adjunction F G (pr1 etaeps) (pr2 etaeps).

  
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
HH: form_adjunction F G eta eps
are_adjoints F G

  
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
HH: form_adjunction F G eta eps
are_adjoints F G

    
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
G: B ⟶ A
eta: functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ G
eps: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
HH: form_adjunction F G eta eps
form_adjunction F G (pr1 (eta,, eps))
  (pr2 (eta,, eps))

    exact HH.
  Defined.

  Definition adjunction (A B : category) : UU
    := ∑ X : adjunction_data A B, form_adjunction' X.

  Coercion data_from_adjunction {A B} (X : adjunction A B)
    : adjunction_data _ _ := pr1 X.

  Definition make_adjunction {A B : category}
             (adjData : adjunction_data A B)
             (adjProp : form_adjunction' adjData) : adjunction A B
    := (adjData ,, adjProp).

  Definition form_adjunction_from_adjunction {A B : category}
             (adj : adjunction A B) : form_adjunction' adj
    := pr2 adj.

  Definition triangle_1_statement_from_adjunction {A B : category}
             (adj : adjunction A B) : triangle_1_statement adj
    := pr1 (pr2 adj).

  Definition triangle_2_statement_from_adjunction {A B : category}
             (adj : adjunction A B) : triangle_2_statement adj
    := pr2 (pr2 adj).

  
A, B: category
X: adjunction A B
are_adjoints (left_functor X) (right_functor X)

  
A, B: category
X: adjunction A B
are_adjoints (left_functor X) (right_functor X)

    
A, B: category
X: adjunction A B
functor_identity A ⟹ left_functor X ∙ right_functor X
A, B: category
X: adjunction A B
right_functor X ∙ left_functor X ⟹ functor_identity B
A, B: category
X: adjunction A B
form_adjunction (left_functor X) (right_functor X)
  ?eta ?eps

    
A, B: category
X: adjunction A B
functor_identity A ⟹ left_functor X ∙ right_functor X
 exact(adjunit X).
    
A, B: category
X: adjunction A B
right_functor X ∙ left_functor X ⟹ functor_identity B
 exact(adjcounit X).
    
A, B: category
X: adjunction A B
form_adjunction (left_functor X) (right_functor X)
  (adjunit X) (adjcounit X)
 exact(form_adjunction_from_adjunction X).
  Defined.

  Definition unit_from_are_adjoints {A B : category}
             {F : functor A B} {G : functor B A} (H : are_adjoints F G) :
    nat_trans (functor_identity A) (functor_composite F G) := pr1 (pr1 H).

  Definition counit_from_are_adjoints {A B : category}
             {F : functor A B} {G : functor B A} (H : are_adjoints F G)  :
    nat_trans (functor_composite G F) (functor_identity B) := pr2 (pr1 H).

  Definition is_left_adjoint {A B : category} (F : functor A B) : UU :=
    ∑ (G : functor B A), are_adjoints F G.

  Coercion adjunction_data_from_is_left_adjoint {A B : category}
         {F : functor A B} (HF : is_left_adjoint F)
  : adjunction_data A B
  := (F,, _ ,,unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HF) ,,counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HF) ).

  Definition is_right_adjoint {A B : category} (G : functor B A) : UU :=
    ∑ (F : functor A B), are_adjoints F G.

  Definition are_adjoints_to_is_left_adjoint {A B : category} (F : functor A B) (G : functor B A)
             (H : are_adjoints F G) : is_left_adjoint F := (G,,H).

  Coercion are_adjoints_to_is_left_adjoint : are_adjoints >-> is_left_adjoint.

  Definition are_adjoints_to_is_right_adjoint {A B : category} (F : functor A B)
             (G : functor B A) (H : are_adjoints F G) : is_right_adjoint G := (F,,H).

  Coercion are_adjoints_to_is_right_adjoint : are_adjoints >-> is_right_adjoint.

  Definition right_adjoint {A B : category}
             {F : functor A B} (H : is_left_adjoint F) : functor B A := pr1 H.

  
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
H: is_left_adjoint F
is_right_adjoint (right_adjoint H)

  
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
H: is_left_adjoint F
is_right_adjoint (right_adjoint H)

    exact (F,,pr2 H).
  Defined.

  Definition left_adjoint {A B : category}
             {G : functor B A} (H : is_right_adjoint G) : functor A B := pr1 H.

  
A, B: category
G: B ⟶ A
H: is_right_adjoint G
is_left_adjoint (left_adjoint H)

  
A, B: category
G: B ⟶ A
H: is_right_adjoint G
is_left_adjoint (left_adjoint H)

    exact (G,,pr2 H).
  Defined.

  Definition unit_from_left_adjoint {A B : category}
             {F : functor A B}  (H : is_left_adjoint F) :
    nat_trans (functor_identity A) (functor_composite F (right_adjoint H))
    := adjunit H. (* makes use of the coercion above *)

  Definition unit_from_right_adjoint {A B : category}
             {G : functor B A}  (H : is_right_adjoint G) :
    nat_trans (functor_identity A) (functor_composite (left_adjoint H) G)
    := unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 H).

  Definition counit_from_left_adjoint {A B : category}
             {F : functor A B}   (H : is_left_adjoint F)  :
    nat_trans (functor_composite (right_adjoint H) F) (functor_identity B)
    := counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 H).

  Definition counit_from_right_adjoint {A B : category}
             {G : functor B A} (H : is_right_adjoint G)  :
    nat_trans (functor_composite G (left_adjoint H)) (functor_identity B)
    := counit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 H).

  Definition triangle_id_left_ad {A B : category} {F : functor A B} {G : functor B A}
             (H : are_adjoints F G) :
    ∏ a, # F (unit_from_are_adjoints H a)
           · counit_from_are_adjoints H (F a) = identity (F a) := pr1 (pr2 H).

  Definition triangle_id_right_ad {A B : category} {F : functor A B} {G : functor B A}
             (H : are_adjoints F G) :
    ∏ b, unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b) · # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) = identity (G b)
    := pr2 (pr2 H).

  
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
H1: are_adjoints F1 G1
H2: are_adjoints F2 G2
are_adjoints (F1 ∙ F2) (G2 ∙ G1)

  
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
H1: are_adjoints F1 G1
H2: are_adjoints F2 G2
are_adjoints (F1 ∙ F2) (G2 ∙ G1)

    
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity A ⟹ F1 ∙ G1
eps1: G1 ∙ F1 ⟹ functor_identity B
H11: triangle_1_statement
  (F1,,
   G1,, pr1 (eta1,, eps1),, pr2 (eta1,, eps1))
H12: triangle_2_statement
  (F1,,
   G1,, pr1 (eta1,, eps1),, pr2 (eta1,, eps1))
H2: are_adjoints F2 G2
are_adjoints (F1 ∙ F2) (G2 ∙ G1)

    
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity A ⟹ F1 ∙ G1
eps1: G1 ∙ F1 ⟹ functor_identity B
H11: triangle_1_statement
  (F1,,
   G1,, pr1 (eta1,, eps1),, pr2 (eta1,, eps1))
H12: triangle_2_statement
  (F1,,
   G1,, pr1 (eta1,, eps1),, pr2 (eta1,, eps1))
eta2: functor_identity B ⟹ F2 ∙ G2
eps2: G2 ∙ F2 ⟹ functor_identity C
H21: triangle_1_statement
  (F2,,
   G2,, pr1 (eta2,, eps2),, pr2 (eta2,, eps2))
H22: triangle_2_statement
  (F2,,
   G2,, pr1 (eta2,, eps2),, pr2 (eta2,, eps2))
are_adjoints (F1 ∙ F2) (G2 ∙ G1)

F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
are_adjoints (F1 ∙ F2) (G2 ∙ G1)

    
A, B, C: category

G1: B ⟶ A

⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B

H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)

⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)

form_adjunction (F1 ∙ F2) (G2 ∙ G1) ?eta ?eps

G1 ⟹ F2 ∙ (G2 ∙ G1)

      apply (nat_trans_comp _ _ _ (nat_trans_functor_id_right_inv _)
                            (post_whisker eta2 G1)).

H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
(G2 ∙ G1) ∙ (F1 ∙ F2) ⟹ functor_composite_data G2 F2

      
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
G2 ∙ (G1 ∙ (F1 ∙ F2)) ⟹ functor_composite_data G2 F2

      
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
G1 ∙ (F1 ∙ F2) ⟹ F2

      
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
(G1 ∙ F1) ∙ F2 ⟹ F2

      apply (nat_trans_comp _ _ _ (post_whisker eps1 _)
                            (nat_trans_functor_id_left _)).
    
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
form_adjunction (F1 ∙ F2) (G2 ∙ G1)
  (nat_trans_comp (functor_identity_data A)
     (functor_composite_data F1 G1)
     ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ (G2 ∙ G1)) eta1
     (nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F1 G1)
        (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ (G2 ∙ G1)))
        ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ (G2 ∙ G1))
        (pre_whisker F1
           (nat_trans_comp G1
              (G1 ∙ functor_identity A)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data F2 G2) G1)
              (nat_trans_functor_id_right_inv G1)
              (post_whisker eta2 G1)))
        (nat_trans_functor_assoc_inv F1 F2 (G2 ∙ G1))))
  (nat_trans_comp ((G2 ∙ G1) ∙ (F1 ∙ F2))
     (functor_composite_data G2 F2)
     (functor_identity_data C)
     (nat_trans_comp ((G2 ∙ G1) ∙ (F1 ∙ F2))
        (G2 ∙ (G1 ∙ (F1 ∙ F2)))
        (functor_composite_data G2 F2)
        (nat_trans_functor_assoc G2 G1 (F1 ∙ F2))
        (pre_whisker G2
           (nat_trans_comp (G1 ∙ (F1 ∙ F2))
              ((G1 ∙ F1) ∙ F2) F2
              (nat_trans_functor_assoc_inv G1 F1 F2)
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G1 F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F2) F2
                 (post_whisker eps1 F2)
                 (nat_trans_functor_id_left F2)))))
     eps2)
 
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2
  (# F1
     (eta1 a
      · (identity (G1 (pr1 F1 a))
         · # (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 a))
         · identity (G1 (G2 (F2 (F1 a)))))))
· (identity (F2 (F1 (G1 (G2 (F2 (F1 a))))))
   · (identity (F2 (F1 (G1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))))))
      · (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))))
         · identity (F2 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))))))
   · eps2 (F2 (F1 a))) = identity (F2 (F1 a))
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
eta1 (G1 (G2 a))
· (identity (G1 (pr1 F1 (G1 (G2 a))))
   · # (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 (G1 (G2 a))))
   · identity (G1 (G2 (F2 (F1 (G1 (G2 a)))))))
· # G1
    (# G2
       (identity (F2 (F1 (G1 (G2 a))))
        · (identity (F2 (F1 (G1 (pr1 G2 a))))
           · (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 a))
              · identity (F2 (pr1 G2 a)))) · 
        eps2 a)) = identity (G1 (G2 a))

      
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2
  (# F1
     (eta1 a
      · (identity (G1 (pr1 F1 a))
         · # (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 a))
         · identity (G1 (G2 (F2 (F1 a)))))))
· (identity (F2 (F1 (G1 (G2 (F2 (F1 a))))))
   · (identity (F2 (F1 (G1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))))))
      · (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))))
         · identity (F2 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))))))
   · eps2 (F2 (F1 a))) = identity (F2 (F1 a))
 
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2 (# F1 (eta1 a))
· (# F2 (# F1 (# (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 a))))
   · (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))))
      · eps2 (F2 (F1 a)))) =
# F2
  (# (left_functor (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1))
     (adjunit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) a))
· # F2
    (adjcounit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
       (left_functor (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B

H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2 (# F1 (# (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 a))))
· # (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))))
· eps2 (F2 (F1 a)) =
# F2
  (adjcounit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
     (left_functor (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C

eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1

⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2

H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2
  (# F1 (# (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 a)))
   · pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a)))) · eps2 (F2 (F1 a)) =
# F2
  (adjcounit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
     (left_functor (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B

H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)

⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2
  (# F1 (# (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 a)))
   · pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a)))) · eps2 (F2 (F1 a)) =
?b
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C

G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1

H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)

⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
?b =
# F2
  (adjcounit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
     (left_functor (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B

H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)

⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F1 (# (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 a)))
· pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 (F2 (F1 a))) = ?t2
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2 ?t2 · eps2 (F2 (F1 a)) =
# F2
  (adjcounit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
     (left_functor (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2
  (eps1 (F1 a)
   · # (functor_identity_data B) (eta2 (F1 a)))
· eps2 (F2 (F1 a)) =
# F2
  (adjcounit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
     (left_functor (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2 (eps1 (F1 a))
· (# F2 (eta2 (F1 a)) · eps2 (F2 (F1 a))) =
# F2 (adjcounit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) (F1 a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: A
# F2 (eps1 (F1 a))
· identity
    (left_functor (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2) (F1 a)) =
# F2 (adjcounit (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) (F1 a))

        now apply id_right.
      
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
eta1 (G1 (G2 a))
· (identity (G1 (pr1 F1 (G1 (G2 a))))
   · # (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 (G1 (G2 a))))
   · identity (G1 (G2 (F2 (F1 (G1 (G2 a)))))))
· # G1
    (# G2
       (identity (F2 (F1 (G1 (G2 a))))
        · (identity (F2 (F1 (G1 (pr1 G2 a))))
           · (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 a))
              · identity (F2 (pr1 G2 a)))) · eps2 a)) =
identity (G1 (G2 a))
 
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
eta1 (G1 (G2 a))
· # (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 (G1 (G2 a))))
· # G1 (# G2 (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 a))))
· # G1 (# G2 (eps2 a)) =
# G1
  (adjunit (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
     (right_functor (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2) a))
· # G1
    (# (right_functor (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2))
       (adjcounit (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
eta1 (G1 (G2 a))
· (# (pr1 G1) (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 (G1 (G2 a))))
   · # G1 (# G2 (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 a))))) =
# G1
  (adjunit (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
     (right_functor (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
eta1 (G1 (G2 a))
· # G1
    (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 (G1 (G2 a)))
     · # G2 (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 a)))) =
# G1
  (adjunit (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
     (right_functor (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B
H11: triangle_1_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
eta1 (G1 (G2 a))
· # G1
    (pr1 eta2 (pr1 F1 (G1 (G2 a)))
     · # G2 (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 a)))) = 
?b

· # G2 (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 eps1 (pr1 G2 a)))

F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C

A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B

H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)
eta2: functor_identity_data B
⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
eta1 (G1 (G2 a))
· # G1
    (# (functor_identity_data B) (eps1 (G2 a))
     · eta2 (G2 a)) =
# G1
  (adjunit (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
     (right_functor (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B
eta1: functor_identity_data A
⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B

H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)

⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
eta1 (G1 (G2 a)) · # G1 (eps1 (G2 a))
· # G1 (eta2 (G2 a)) =
# G1
  (adjunit (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
     (right_functor (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2) a))

        
A, B, C: category
F1: A ⟶ B
F2: B ⟶ C
G1: B ⟶ A
G2: C ⟶ B

⟹ functor_composite_data F1 G1
eps1: functor_composite_data G1 F1
⟹ functor_identity_data B

H12: triangle_2_statement (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1)

⟹ functor_composite_data F2 G2
eps2: functor_composite_data G2 F2
⟹ functor_identity_data C
H21: triangle_1_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
H22: triangle_2_statement (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
a: C
identity
  (right_functor (F1,, G1,, eta1,, eps1) (G2 a))
· # G1 (eta2 (G2 a)) =
# G1
  (adjunit (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2)
     (right_functor (F2,, G2,, eta2,, eps2) a))

        now apply id_left.

A, B: category

HF2: triangle_2_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
α:= pr1 αiso : F ⟹ G: F ⟹ G
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso : G ⟹ F: G ⟹ F
∏ a : A,
# (left_functor
     (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
        ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)))
  (adjunit
     (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
        ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) a)
· adjcounit
    (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
       ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2))
    (left_functor
       (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
          ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) a) =
identity
  (left_functor
     (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
        ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) a)

      
A, B: category
F, G: A ⟶ B
H: B ⟶ A
αiso: z_iso F G
α': functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ H
β': H ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
HF1: triangle_1_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
HF2: triangle_2_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
α:= pr1 αiso : F ⟹ G: F ⟹ G
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso : G ⟹ F: G ⟹ F
a: A
# G (α' a) · # G (# (pr1 H) ((pr11 αiso) a))
· pr1 (inv_from_z_iso αiso) (pr1 H (G a)) · β' (G a) =
identity (G a)

      
A, B: category
F, G: A ⟶ B
H: B ⟶ A

β': H ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B

HF2: triangle_2_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
α:= pr1 αiso : F ⟹ G: F ⟹ G
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso : G ⟹ F: G ⟹ F
a: A
# G (α' a)
· (αinv (H (F a)) · # F (# (pr1 H) ((pr11 αiso) a)))
· β' (G a) = identity (G a)

a: A
# G (α' a)
· (αinv (H (F a))
   · (β' (F a)
      · # (functor_identity B) ((pr11 αiso) a))) =
identity (G a)

· (β' (F a) · (pr11 αiso) a) = identity (G a)

A, B: category

H: B ⟶ A

HF2: triangle_2_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')

αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso : G ⟹ F: G ⟹ F
a: A
αinv a · identity (left_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') a)
· (pr11 αiso) a = identity (G a)

      now rewrite id_right; apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv αiso)).
    
A, B: category
F, G: A ⟶ B
H: B ⟶ A
αiso: z_iso F G
α': functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ H

HF1: triangle_1_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
HF2: triangle_2_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
α:= pr1 αiso : F ⟹ G: F ⟹ G
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso : G ⟹ F: G ⟹ F
triangle_2_statement
  (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
     ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2))
 
A, B: category
F, G: A ⟶ B
H: B ⟶ A
αiso: z_iso F G
α': functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ H
β': H ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
HF1: triangle_1_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
HF2: ∏ b : B,
adjunit (F,, H,, α',, β')
  (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)
· # (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β'))
    (adjcounit (F,, H,, α',, β') b) =
identity (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
∏ b : B,
adjunit
  (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
     ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2))
  (right_functor
     (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
        ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) b)
· # (right_functor
       (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
          ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)))
    (adjcounit
       (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
          ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) b) =
identity
  (right_functor
     (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
        ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) b)

      
A, B: category
F, G: A ⟶ B
H: B ⟶ A
αiso: z_iso F G
α': functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ H
β': H ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B

HF2: ∏ b : B,
adjunit (F,, H,, α',, β')
  (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)
· # (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β'))
    (adjcounit (F,, H,, α',, β') b) =
identity (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)

αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
b: B
α'
  (right_functor
     (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
        ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) b)
· # (pr1 H)
    ((pr11 αiso)
       (right_functor
          (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H
             αiso ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) b))
· # (right_functor
       (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
          ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)))
    (pr1 (inv_from_z_iso αiso) (pr1 H b))
· # (right_functor
       (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
          ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2))) (β' b) =
identity
  (right_functor
     (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
        ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) b)

     · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso αiso) (pr1 H b))

A, B: category

αiso: z_iso F G

HF2: ∏ b : B,
adjunit (F,, H,, α',, β')
  (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)
· # (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β'))
    (adjcounit (F,, H,, α',, β') b) =

b: B
α'
  (right_functor
     (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
        ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2)) b)
· # (right_functor
       (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
          ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2))) (identity F (H b))
· # (right_functor
       (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_data F G H αiso
          ((α',, β'),, HF1,, HF2))) (β' b) =

  (right_functor

A, B: category
F, G: A ⟶ B
H: B ⟶ A
αiso: z_iso F G
α': functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ H
β': H ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
HF1: triangle_1_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
HF2: ∏ b : B,
adjunit (F,, H,, α',, β')
  (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)
· # (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β'))
    (adjcounit (F,, H,, α',, β') b) =
identity (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
b: B
α' (H b) · # H (identity (pr1 F (H b))) · # H (β' b) =
identity (H b)
 
A, B: category
F, G: A ⟶ B
H: B ⟶ A
αiso: z_iso F G
α': functor_identity A ⟹ F ∙ H
β': H ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity B
HF1: triangle_1_statement (F,, H,, α',, β')
HF2: ∏ b : B,
adjunit (F,, H,, α',, β')
  (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)
· # (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β'))
    (adjcounit (F,, H,, α',, β') b) =
identity (right_functor (F,, H,, α',, β') b)
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
b: B
α' (H b) · # H (β' b) = identity (H b)
 apply (HF2 b).
  Qed.

  
A, B: category
F, G: A ⟶ B
H: B ⟶ A
αiso: z_iso F G
HF: are_adjoints F H
are_adjoints G H

αiso: z_iso F G
HF: are_adjoints F H

form_adjunction G H ?eta ?eps

HF: are_adjoints F H

  αiso HF: adjunction_data A B
functor_identity A ⟹ G ∙ H
 exact (adjunit adj_data).

A, B: category

  αiso HF: adjunction_data A B
form_adjunction G H (adjunit adj_data)
  (adjcounit adj_data)
 apply are_adjoints_closed_under_iso_laws.
  Defined.

is_left_adjoint G

F, G: A ⟶ B
αiso: z_iso F G
F': B ⟶ A
Hisadj: are_adjoints F F'
is_left_adjoint G

    exact (F',,are_adjoints_closed_under_iso F G F' αiso Hisadj).
  Defined.

  (** * Identity functor is a left adjoint *)


  
A: category
is_left_adjoint (functor_identity A)

  
A: category
is_left_adjoint (functor_identity A)

    
A: category
A ⟶ A
A: category
(λ G : A ⟶ A, are_adjoints (functor_identity A) G)
  ?pr1

    
A: category
A ⟶ A
 exact (functor_identity A).
    
A: category
(λ G : A ⟶ A, are_adjoints (functor_identity A) G)
  (functor_identity A)
 
A: category
form_adjunction (functor_identity A)
  (functor_identity A)
  (pr1
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity A),,
      nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity A ∙ functor_identity A)))
  (pr2
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity A),,
      nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity A ∙ functor_identity A)))

      abstract (now split; [intros a; apply id_left| intros a; apply id_left]).
  Defined.

  (** * Construction of an adjunction from some partial data (Theorem 2 (iv) of Chapter IV.1 of
      MacLane) *)
Section right_adjoint_from_partial.

Definition is_universal_arrow_from {D C : category}
           (S : functor D C) (c : C) (r : D) (v : C⟦S r, c⟧) : UU :=
  ∏ (d : D) (f : C⟦S d,c⟧), ∃! (f' : D⟦d,r⟧), f = # S f' · v.

Context {X A : category}
        (F : functor X A)
        (G0 : ob A -> ob X)
        (eps : ∏ a, A⟦F (G0 a),a⟧)
        (Huniv : ∏ a, is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)).


X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
functor_data A X


X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
functor_data A X

  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
A → X
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
(λ F : A → X, ∏ a b : A, A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → X ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ?pr1

  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
A → X
 apply G0.
  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
(λ F : A → X, ∏ a b : A, A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → X ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  G0
 
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧

    apply (pr1 (pr1 (Huniv b (G0 a) (eps a · f)))).
Defined.


X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
is_functor G_data

eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)

X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A

eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
functor_idax G_data
 
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
pr11 (Huniv a (G0 a) (eps a · identity a)) =
identity (G0 a)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
eps a · identity a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
H: eps a · identity a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
pr11 (Huniv a (G0 a) (eps a · identity a)) =
identity (G0 a)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
eps a · identity a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
 now rewrite functor_id, id_left, id_right. 
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
H: eps a · identity a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
pr11 (Huniv a (G0 a) (eps a · identity a)) =
identity (G0 a)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
H: eps a · identity a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
H2:= Huniv a (G0 a) (eps a · identity a): ∃! f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧,
eps a · identity a = # F f' · eps a
pr11 H2 = identity (G0 a)

    apply (pathsinv0 (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 H2 (_,,H)))).
  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
functor_compax G_data
 
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr11 (Huniv c (G0 a) (eps a · (f · g))) =
pr11 (Huniv b (G0 a) (eps a · f))
· pr11 (Huniv c (G0 b) (eps b · g))

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H2:= Huniv c (G0 a) (eps a · (f · g)): ∃! f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c
pr11 H2 =
pr11 (Huniv b (G0 a) (eps a · f))
· pr11 (Huniv c (G0 b) (eps b · g))

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
fac =
pr11 (Huniv b (G0 a) (eps a · f))
· pr11 (Huniv c (G0 b) (eps b · g))

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
H1:= Huniv b (G0 a) (eps a · f): ∃! f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧,
eps a · f = # F f' · eps b
fac = pr11 H1 · pr11 (Huniv c (G0 b) (eps b · g))

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
fab: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧
Hfab: eps a · f = # F fab · eps b
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧,
    eps a · f = # F f' · eps b, 
t = fab,, Hfab
fac = fab · pr11 (Huniv c (G0 b) (eps b · g))

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
fab: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧
Hfab: eps a · f = # F fab · eps b
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧,
    eps a · f = # F f' · eps b, 
t = fab,, Hfab
H0:= Huniv c (G0 b) (eps b · g): ∃! f' : X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧,
eps b · g = # F f' · eps c
fac = fab · pr11 H0

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
fab: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧
Hfab: eps a · f = # F fab · eps b
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧,
    eps a · f = # F f' · eps b, 
t = fab,, Hfab
fbc: X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧
Hfbc: eps b · g = # F fbc · eps c
p2: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧,
    eps b · g = # F f' · eps c, 
t = fbc,, Hfbc
fac = fab · fbc

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
fab: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧
Hfab: eps a · f = # F fab · eps b
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧,
    eps a · f = # F f' · eps b, 
t = fab,, Hfab
fbc: X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧
Hfbc: eps b · g = # F fbc · eps c
p2: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧,
    eps b · g = # F f' · eps c, 
t = fbc,, Hfbc
eps a · (f · g) = # F (fab · fbc) · eps c
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
fab: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧
Hfab: eps a · f = # F fab · eps b
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧,
    eps a · f = # F f' · eps b, 
t = fab,, Hfab
fbc: X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧
Hfbc: eps b · g = # F fbc · eps c
p2: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧,
    eps b · g = # F f' · eps c, 
t = fbc,, Hfbc
H: eps a · (f · g) = # F (fab · fbc) · eps c
fac = fab · fbc

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
fab: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧
Hfab: eps a · f = # F fab · eps b
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧,
    eps a · f = # F f' · eps b, 
t = fab,, Hfab
fbc: X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧
Hfbc: eps b · g = # F fbc · eps c
p2: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧,
    eps b · g = # F f' · eps c, 
t = fbc,, Hfbc
eps a · (f · g) = # F (fab · fbc) · eps c
 now rewrite assoc, Hfab, <- assoc, Hfbc, assoc, <- functor_comp. 
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
fac: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧
Hfac: eps a · (f · g) = # F fac · eps c
p: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 c ⟧,
    eps a · (f · g) = # F f' · eps c,
t = fac,, Hfac
fab: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧
Hfab: eps a · f = # F fab · eps b
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 b ⟧,
    eps a · f = # F f' · eps b, 
t = fab,, Hfab
fbc: X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧
Hfbc: eps b · g = # F fbc · eps c
p2: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 b, G0 c ⟧,
    eps b · g = # F f' · eps c, 
t = fbc,, Hfbc
H: eps a · (f · g) = # F (fab · fbc) · eps c
fac = fab · fbc

    apply (pathsinv0 (maponpaths pr1 (p (_,,H)))).
Qed.

Local Definition G : functor A X := tpair _ G_data G_is_functor.


X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
functor_identity X ⟹ F ∙ G


X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
functor_identity X ⟹ F ∙ G

  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
nat_trans_data (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G)
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
is_nat_trans (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G) ?t

  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
nat_trans_data (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G)
 
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
x: X
X ⟦ functor_identity X x, (F ∙ G) x ⟧

    apply (pr1 (pr1 (Huniv (F x) x (identity _)))).
  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
is_nat_trans (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G)
  ((λ x : X, pr11 (Huniv (F x) x (identity (F x))))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G))
 abstract (
      intros x y f;
      simpl;
      destruct (Huniv (F y) y (identity (F y))) as [t p], t as [t p0];
      simpl;
      destruct (Huniv (F x) x (identity (F x))) as [t0 p1], t0 as [t0 p2];
      simpl;
      destruct
        (Huniv (F y) (G0 (F x)) (eps (F x) · # F f)) as [t1 p3], t1 as [t1 p4];
      simpl;
      assert (H1 : # F f = # F (t0 · t1) · eps (F y));
      [now rewrite functor_comp, <- assoc, <- p4, assoc, <- p2, id_left|];
      destruct (Huniv (F y) x (# F f)) as [t2 p5];
      set (HH := (maponpaths pr1 (p5 (_,,H1))));
      simpl in HH;
      rewrite HH;
      assert (H2 : # F f = # F (f · t) · eps (F y));
      [now rewrite functor_comp, <- assoc, <- p0, id_right|];
      set (HHH := (maponpaths pr1 (p5 (_,,H2)))); simpl in HHH;
      now rewrite HHH
    ).
Defined.


X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity A


X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity A

  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A)
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
(λ t : nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A),
 is_nat_trans (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A) t) 
  ?pr1

  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A)
 
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
∏ x : A, A ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, functor_identity A x ⟧

    apply eps.
  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
(λ t : nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A),
 is_nat_trans (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A) t)
  (eps : nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A))
 abstract (
      intros a b f;
      apply (pathsinv0 (pr2 (pr1 (Huniv b (G0 a) (eps a · f)))))
    ).
Defined.


X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
form_adjunction F G unit counit

F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)

F: X ⟶ A

eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
triangle_1_statement (F,, G,, unit,, counit)

G0: A → X

is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)

X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧

is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)

X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
∏ a : X,
# F (pr11 (Huniv (F a) a (identity (F a))))
· eps (F a) = identity (F a)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
x: X
# F (pr11 (Huniv (F x) x (identity (F x))))
· eps (F x) = identity (F x)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
x: X
f: X ⟦ x, G0 (F x) ⟧
hf: identity (F x) = # F f · eps (F x)
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ x, G0 (F x) ⟧,
    identity (F x) = # F f' · eps (F x),
t = f,, hf
# F f · eps (F x) = identity (F x)

    apply (!hf).
  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧

X, A: category

eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
pr11 (Huniv (F (G0 a)) (G0 a) (identity (F (G0 a))))
· pr11 (Huniv a (G0 (F (G0 a)))
          (eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a)) = identity (G0 a)

    identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f' · eps (F (G0 a)),
t = f,, hf
f
· pr11 (Huniv a (G0 (F (G0 a)))
          (eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a)) = identity (G0 a)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X

a: A
f: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧
hf: identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f · eps (F (G0 a))

t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧,
    identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f' · eps (F (G0 a)),
t = f,, hf
g: X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧
hg: eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F g · eps a
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧,
    eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F f' · eps a,
t = g,, hg
f · g = identity (G0 a)

t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧, eps a = # F f' · eps a

     eps a = # F f' · eps a, 
t0 = t

X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
f: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧
hf: identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f · eps (F (G0 a))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧,
    identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f' · eps (F (G0 a)),
t = f,, hf
g: X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧
hg: eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F g · eps a
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧,
    eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F f' · eps a,
t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧, eps a = # F f' · eps a
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧,
     eps a = # F f' · eps a, 
t0 = t
H1: eps a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
H2: eps a = # F (f · g) · eps a
f · g = identity (G0 a)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
f: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧
hf: identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f · eps (F (G0 a))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧,
    identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f' · eps (F (G0 a)),
t = f,, hf
g: X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧
hg: eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F g · eps a
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧,
    eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F f' · eps a,
t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧, eps a = # F f' · eps a
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧,
     eps a = # F f' · eps a, 
t0 = t
H1: eps a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
H2: eps a = # F (f · g) · eps a
f · g = identity (G0 a)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
f: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧
hf: identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f · eps (F (G0 a))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧,
    identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f' · eps (F (G0 a)),
t = f,, hf
g: X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧
hg: eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F g · eps a
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧,
    eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F f' · eps a,
t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧, eps a = # F f' · eps a
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧,
     eps a = # F f' · eps a, 
t0 = t
H1: eps a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
H2: eps a = # F (f · g) · eps a
HH:= maponpaths pr1 (p (identity (G0 a),, H1)): identity (G0 a) = pr1 t
f · g = identity (G0 a)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
f: X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧
hf: identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f · eps (F (G0 a))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 (F (G0 a)) ⟧,
    identity (F (G0 a)) = # F f' · eps (F (G0 a)),
t = f,, hf
g: X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧
hg: eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F g · eps a
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 (F (G0 a)), G0 a ⟧,
    eps (F (G0 a)) · eps a = # F f' · eps a,
t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧, eps a = # F f' · eps a
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : X ⟦ G0 a, G0 a ⟧,
     eps a = # F f' · eps a, 
t0 = t
H1: eps a = # F (identity (G0 a)) · eps a
H2: eps a = # F (f · g) · eps a
HH:= maponpaths pr1 (p (identity (G0 a),, H1)): identity (G0 a) = pr1 t
HHH:= maponpaths pr1 (p (f · g,, H2)): f · g = pr1 t
f · g = identity (G0 a)

    now rewrite HHH, <- HH.
Qed.

Definition left_adjoint_from_partial : is_left_adjoint F :=
  (G,, (unit,, counit),, form_adjunctionFG).
Definition right_adjoint_from_partial : is_right_adjoint G :=
  (F,, (unit,, counit),, form_adjunctionFG).

End right_adjoint_from_partial.

  (** * Construction of an adjunction from some partial data

(Theorem 2 (ii) of Chapter IV.1 of  MacLane) *)

Section left_adjoint_from_partial.


Definition is_universal_arrow_to {D C : precategory}
           (S : functor D C) (c : C) (r : D) (v : C⟦c, S r⟧) : UU :=
  ∏ (d : D) (f : C⟦c, S d⟧), ∃! (f' : D⟦r,d⟧), v · #S f' = f.

Context {X A : category}
        (G : functor A X)
        (F0 : ob X -> ob A)
        (eta : ∏ x, X⟦x, G (F0 x)⟧)
        (Huniv : ∏ x, is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)).


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
functor_data X A


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
functor_data X A

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
X → A
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
(λ F : X → A, ∏ a b : X, X ⟦ a, b ⟧ → A ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ?pr1

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
X → A
 apply F0.
  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
(λ F : X → A, ∏ a b : X, X ⟦ a, b ⟧ → A ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  F0
 
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
A ⟦ F0 a, F0 b ⟧

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
X ⟦ a, G (F0 b) ⟧
 apply (f · eta _ ).
    (* apply (pr1 (pr1 (Huniv b (G0 a) (eps a · f)))). *)
Defined.


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
is_functor F_data


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
is_functor F_data

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
functor_idax F_data
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
functor_compax F_data

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
functor_idax F_data
 
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
pr11 (Huniv x (F0 x) (identity x · eta x)) =
identity (F0 x)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
eta x · # G (identity (F0 x)) = identity x · eta x

    rewrite functor_id, id_left, id_right; apply idpath.
  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
functor_compax F_data
 
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b, c: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: X ⟦ b, c ⟧
pr11 (Huniv a (F0 c) (f · g · eta c)) =
pr11 (Huniv a (F0 b) (f · eta b))
· pr11 (Huniv b (F0 c) (g · eta c))

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b, c: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: X ⟦ b, c ⟧
eta a
· # G
    (pr11 (Huniv a (F0 b) (f · eta b))
     · pr11 (Huniv b (F0 c) (g · eta c))) =
f · g · eta c

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b, c: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: X ⟦ b, c ⟧
eta a · # G (pr11 (Huniv a (F0 b) (f · eta b)))
· # G (pr11 (Huniv b (F0 c) (g · eta c))) =
f · g · eta c

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b, c: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: X ⟦ b, c ⟧
H2:= Huniv a (F0 b) (f · eta b): ∃! f' : A ⟦ F0 a, F0 b ⟧,
eta a · # G f' = f · eta b
eta a · # G (pr11 H2)
· # G (pr11 (Huniv b (F0 c) (g · eta c))) =
f · g · eta c

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b, c: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: X ⟦ b, c ⟧
H2:= Huniv a (F0 b) (f · eta b): ∃! f' : A ⟦ F0 a, F0 b ⟧,
eta a · # G f' = f · eta b
f · eta b · # G (pr11 (Huniv b (F0 c) (g · eta c))) =
f · g · eta c

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b, c: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: X ⟦ b, c ⟧
H2:= Huniv a (F0 b) (f · eta b): ∃! f' : A ⟦ F0 a, F0 b ⟧,
eta a · # G f' = f · eta b
eta b · # G (pr11 (Huniv b (F0 c) (g · eta c))) =
g · eta c

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b, c: X
f: X ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: X ⟦ b, c ⟧
H2:= Huniv a (F0 b) (f · eta b): ∃! f' : A ⟦ F0 a, F0 b ⟧,
eta a · # G f' = f · eta b
H3:= Huniv b (F0 c) (g · eta c): ∃! f' : A ⟦ F0 b, F0 c ⟧,
eta b · # G f' = g · eta c
eta b · # G (pr11 H3) = g · eta c

    apply (pr2 (pr1 H3)).
Defined.

Local Definition left_adj_from_partial : functor X A := F_data,, F_is_functor.
Local Notation F := left_adj_from_partial.


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity A


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity A

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A)
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
is_nat_trans (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A) ?t

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A)
 
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a: A
A ⟦ (G ∙ F) a, functor_identity A a ⟧

    apply (pr1 (pr1 (Huniv _ _  (identity _)))).
  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
is_nat_trans (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A)
  ((λ a : A, pr11 (Huniv (G a) a (identity (G a))))
   :
   nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity A))
 
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr11 (Huniv (G a) (F0 (G b)) (# G f · eta (G b)))
· pr11 (Huniv (G b) b (identity (G b))) =
pr11 (Huniv (G a) a (identity (G a))) · f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
pr11 (Huniv (G a) (F0 (G b)) (# G f · eta (G b))) · t =
pr11 (Huniv (G a) a (identity (G a))) · f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
pr11 (Huniv (G a) (F0 (G b)) (# G f · eta (G b))) · t =
t0 · f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
t1: A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧
p4: eta (G a) · # G t1 = # G f · eta (G b)
p3: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f · eta (G b),
t = t1,, p4
t1 · t = t0 · f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
t1: A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧
p4: eta (G a) · # G t1 = # G f · eta (G b)
p3: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f · eta (G b),
t = t1,, p4
# G f = eta (G a) · # G (t1 · t)
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
t1: A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧
p4: eta (G a) · # G t1 = # G f · eta (G b)
p3: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f · eta (G b),
t = t1,, p4
H1: # G f = eta (G a) · # G (t1 · t)
t1 · t = t0 · f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
t1: A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧
p4: eta (G a) · # G t1 = # G f · eta (G b)
p3: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f · eta (G b),
t = t1,, p4
# G f = eta (G a) · # G (t1 · t)

t = t1,, p4

X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
t1: A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧
p4: eta (G a) · # G t1 = # G f · eta (G b)
p3: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f · eta (G b),
t = t1,, p4
H1: # G f = eta (G a) · # G (t1 · t)
t1 · t = t0 · f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
t1: A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧
p4: eta (G a) · # G t1 = # G f · eta (G b)
p3: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f · eta (G b),
t = t1,, p4
H1: # G f = eta (G a) · # G (t1 · t)
t2: ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), b ⟧,
eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f
p5: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), b ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f, 
t = t2
t1 · t = t0 · f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
t1: A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧
p4: eta (G a) · # G t1 = # G f · eta (G b)
p3: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f · eta (G b),
t = t1,, p4
H1: # G f = eta (G a) · # G (t1 · t)
t2: ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), b ⟧,
eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f
p5: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), b ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f, 
t = t2
HH:= maponpaths pr1 (p5 (t1 · t,, ! H1)): t1 · t = pr1 t2
pr1 t2 = t0 · f

X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a, b: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
t: A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧
p0: eta (G b) · # G t = identity (G b)
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G b), b ⟧,
     eta (G b) · # G f' = identity (G b),
t0 = t,, p0
t0: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
p2: eta (G a) · # G t0 = identity (G a)
p1: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = t0,, p2
t1: A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧
p4: eta (G a) · # G t1 = # G f · eta (G b)
p3: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), F0 (G b) ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f · eta (G b),
t = t1,, p4
H1: # G f = eta (G a) · # G (t1 · t)
t2: ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), b ⟧,
eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f
p5: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), b ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = # G f, 
t = t2
HH:= maponpaths pr1 (p5 (t1 · t,, ! H1)): t1 · t = pr1 t2
H2: # G f = eta (G a) · # G (t0 · f)
pr1 t2 = t0 · f

    set (HHH := (maponpaths pr1 (p5 (_,,!H2)))); simpl in HHH;
    now rewrite HHH.
Defined.


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
functor_identity X ⟹ F ∙ G


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
functor_identity X ⟹ F ∙ G

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
nat_trans_data (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G)
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
(λ t : nat_trans_data (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G),
 is_nat_trans (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G) t) 
  ?pr1

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
nat_trans_data (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G)
 
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
∏ x : X, X ⟦ functor_identity X x, (F ∙ G) x ⟧
 apply eta.
  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
(λ t : nat_trans_data (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G),
 is_nat_trans (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G) t)
  (eta : nat_trans_data (functor_identity X) (F ∙ G))
 abstract (intros a b f; simpl; apply (pathsinv0 (pr2 (pr1 (Huniv _ _  (f · eta _ )))))).
Defined.


X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
form_adjunction F G unit_left_from_partial
  counit_left_from_partial

  (F,,

X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,

X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
∏ a : X,
pr11 (Huniv a (F0 (G (F0 a))) (eta a · eta (G (F0 a))))
· pr11 (Huniv (G (F0 a)) (F0 a) (identity (G (F0 a)))) =
identity (F0 a)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
pr11 (Huniv x (F0 (G (F0 x))) (eta x · eta (G (F0 x))))
· pr11 (Huniv (G (F0 x)) (F0 x) (identity (G (F0 x)))) =
identity (F0 x)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
f: A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧
hf: eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f = identity (G (F0 x))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧,
    eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f' = identity (G (F0 x)),
t = f,, hf
pr11 (Huniv x (F0 (G (F0 x))) (eta x · eta (G (F0 x))))
· f = identity (F0 x)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
f: A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧
hf: eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f = identity (G (F0 x))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧,
    eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f' = identity (G (F0 x)),
t = f,, hf
g: A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧
hg: eta x · # G g = eta x · eta (G (F0 x))
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧,
    eta x · # G f' = eta x · eta (G (F0 x)),
t = g,, hg
g · f = identity (F0 x)

g: A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧

p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧,
     eta x · # G f' = eta x, 
t0 = t
g · f = identity (F0 x)

     eta x · # G f' = eta x,

G: A ⟶ X
