eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
f: A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧
hf: eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f = identity (G (F0 x))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧,
    eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f' = identity (G (F0 x)),
t = f,, hf
g: A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧
hg: eta x · # G g = eta x · eta (G (F0 x))
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧,
    eta x · # G f' = eta x · eta (G (F0 x)),
t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧, eta x · # G f' = eta x
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧,
     eta x · # G f' = eta x, 
t0 = t
H1: eta x = eta x · # G (identity (F0 x))
eta x = eta x · identity (G (F0 x))
 now rewrite id_right. 
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
f: A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧
hf: eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f = identity (G (F0 x))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧,
    eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f' = identity (G (F0 x)),
t = f,, hf
g: A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧
hg: eta x · # G g = eta x · eta (G (F0 x))
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧,
    eta x · # G f' = eta x · eta (G (F0 x)),
t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧, eta x · # G f' = eta x
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧,
     eta x · # G f' = eta x, 
t0 = t
H1: eta x = eta x · # G (identity (F0 x))
H2: eta x = eta x · # G (g · f)
g · f = identity (F0 x)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
f: A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧
hf: eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f = identity (G (F0 x))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧,
    eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f' = identity (G (F0 x)),
t = f,, hf
g: A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧
hg: eta x · # G g = eta x · eta (G (F0 x))
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧,
    eta x · # G f' = eta x · eta (G (F0 x)),
t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧, eta x · # G f' = eta x
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧,
     eta x · # G f' = eta x, 
t0 = t
H1: eta x = eta x · # G (identity (F0 x))
H2: eta x = eta x · # G (g · f)
HH:= maponpaths pr1 (p (identity (F0 x),, ! H1)): identity (F0 x) = pr1 t
g · f = identity (F0 x)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
f: A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧
hf: eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f = identity (G (F0 x))
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G (F0 x)), F0 x ⟧,
    eta (G (F0 x)) · # G f' = identity (G (F0 x)),
t = f,, hf
g: A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧
hg: eta x · # G g = eta x · eta (G (F0 x))
Hg: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 (G (F0 x)) ⟧,
    eta x · # G f' = eta x · eta (G (F0 x)),
t = g,, hg
t: ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧, eta x · # G f' = eta x
p: ∏
t0 : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 x, F0 x ⟧,
     eta x · # G f' = eta x, 
t0 = t
H1: eta x = eta x · # G (identity (F0 x))
H2: eta x = eta x · # G (g · f)
HH:= maponpaths pr1 (p (identity (F0 x),, ! H1)): identity (F0 x) = pr1 t
HHH:= maponpaths pr1 (p (g · f,, ! H2)): g · f = pr1 t
g · f = identity (F0 x)

    now rewrite HHH, <- HH.
  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
triangle_2_statement
  (F,,
   G,,
   unit_left_from_partial,, counit_left_from_partial)
 
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
∏ b : A,
eta (G b)
· # G (pr11 (Huniv (G b) b (identity (G b)))) =
identity (G b)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a: A
eta (G a)
· # G (pr11 (Huniv (G a) a (identity (G a)))) =
identity (G a)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
a: A
f: A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧
hf: eta (G a) · # G f = identity (G a)
H: ∏
t : ∑ f' : A ⟦ F0 (G a), a ⟧,
    eta (G a) · # G f' = identity (G a),
t = f,, hf
eta (G a) · # G f = identity (G a)

    apply hf.
Defined.

Definition right_adjoint_left_from_partial : is_right_adjoint G :=
  (F,, (unit_left_from_partial,, counit_left_from_partial),,
    form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial).

Definition left_adjoint_left_from_partial : is_left_adjoint F :=
  (G,, (unit_left_from_partial,, _),, form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial).

End left_adjoint_from_partial.


(** * Post-composition with a left adjoint is a left adjoint *)
Section postcomp.

Context {C D E : category}
        (F : functor D E) (HF : is_left_adjoint F).

Let G : functor E D := right_adjoint HF.
Let H : are_adjoints F G := pr2 HF.
Let η : nat_trans (functor_identity D) (functor_composite F G):= unit_from_left_adjoint H.
Let ε : nat_trans (functor_composite G F) (functor_identity E) := counit_from_left_adjoint H.
Let H1 : ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a) := triangle_id_left_ad H.
Let H2 : ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b) := triangle_id_right_ad H.


C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
is_left_adjoint (post_composition_functor C D E F)


C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
is_left_adjoint (post_composition_functor C D E F)

  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
are_adjoints (post_composition_functor C D E F)
  (post_composition_functor C E D G)

  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
functor_identity [C, D]
⟹ post_composition_functor C D E F
  ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
× post_composition_functor C E D G
  ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
  ⟹ functor_identity [C, E]
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
(λ etaeps : functor_identity [C, D]
            ⟹ post_composition_functor C D E F
              ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
            × post_composition_functor C E D G
              ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
              ⟹ functor_identity [C, E],
 form_adjunction (post_composition_functor C D E F)
   (post_composition_functor C E D G) (pr1 etaeps)
   (pr2 etaeps)) ?pr1

  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
functor_identity [C, D]
⟹ post_composition_functor C D E F
  ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
× post_composition_functor C E D G
  ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
  ⟹ functor_identity [C, E]
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
functor_identity [C, D]
⟹ post_composition_functor C D E F
  ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
post_composition_functor C E D G
∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
⟹ functor_identity [C, E]

    
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
functor_identity [C, D]
⟹ post_composition_functor C D E F
  ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C, D])
  (post_composition_functor C D E F
   ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
is_nat_trans (functor_identity [C, D])
  (post_composition_functor C D E F
   ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G) ?t

      
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C, D])
  (post_composition_functor C D E F
   ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
F': functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ functor_identity_data (functor_precategory_data C D)
    F',
functor_composite_data
  (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)
  (post_composition_functor_data C E D G) F' ⟧
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
F': C ⟶ D
functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ functor_identity_data (functor_precategory_data C D)
    F',
functor_composite_data
  (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)
  (post_composition_functor_data C E D G) F' ⟧

        apply (nat_trans_comp _ _ _
                              (nat_trans_comp _ _ _ (nat_trans_functor_id_right_inv F')
                                              (pre_whisker F' η))
                              (nat_trans_functor_assoc_inv _ _ _)).
      
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
is_nat_trans (functor_identity [C, D])
  (post_composition_functor C D E F
   ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
  (((λ F' : functor_precategory_ob_mor C D,
     nat_trans_comp F'
       (functor_composite_data F' (F ∙ G))
       ((F' ∙ F) ∙ G)
       (nat_trans_comp F' (F' ∙ functor_identity D)
          (functor_composite_data F' (F ∙ G))
          (nat_trans_functor_id_right_inv F')
          (pre_whisker F' η))
       (nat_trans_functor_assoc_inv F' F G))
    :
    nat_trans_data
      (functor_identity_data
         (functor_precategory_data C D))
      (functor_composite_data
         (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)
         (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C, D])
     (post_composition_functor C D E F
      ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G))
 abstract (intros F1 F2 α; apply (nat_trans_eq D); intro c; simpl in *;
                    now rewrite !id_right, !id_left; apply (nat_trans_ax η (F1 c) _ (α c))).
    
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
post_composition_functor C E D G
∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
⟹ functor_identity [C, E]
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
nat_trans_data
  (post_composition_functor C E D G
   ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
  (functor_identity [C, E])
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
is_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor C E D G
   ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
  (functor_identity [C, E]) ?t

      
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
nat_trans_data
  (post_composition_functor C E D G
   ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
  (functor_identity [C, E])
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
F': functor_precategory_ob_mor C E
functor_precategory_ob_mor C E
⟦ functor_composite_data
    (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)
    (post_composition_functor_data C D E F) F',
functor_identity_data (functor_precategory_data C E)
  F' ⟧
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
F': C ⟶ E
functor_precategory_ob_mor C E
⟦ functor_composite_data
    (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)
    (post_composition_functor_data C D E F) F',
functor_identity_data (functor_precategory_data C E)
  F' ⟧

        apply (nat_trans_comp _ _ _
                              (nat_trans_functor_assoc _ _ _)
                              (nat_trans_comp _ _ _ (pre_whisker F' ε)
                                              (nat_trans_functor_id_left _))).
      
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
is_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor C E D G
   ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
  (functor_identity [C, E])
  (((λ F' : functor_precategory_ob_mor C E,
     nat_trans_comp ((F' ∙ G) ∙ F) (F' ∙ (G ∙ F)) F'
       (nat_trans_functor_assoc F' G F)
       (nat_trans_comp
          (functor_composite_data F' (G ∙ F))
          (functor_composite_data F'
             (functor_identity E)) F'
          (pre_whisker F' ε)
          (nat_trans_functor_id_left F')))
    :
    nat_trans_data
      (functor_composite_data
         (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)
         (post_composition_functor_data C D E F))
      (functor_identity_data
         (functor_precategory_data C E)))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (post_composition_functor C E D G
      ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
     (functor_identity [C, E]))
 abstract (intros F1 F2 α; apply (nat_trans_eq E); intro c; simpl in *;
                    now rewrite !id_right, !id_left; apply (nat_trans_ax ε _ _ (α c))).
  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
G:= right_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity D ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity E
H1:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ a : D, # F (η a) · ε (F a) = identity (F a)
H2:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ b : E, η (G b) · # G (ε b) = identity (G b)
(λ etaeps : functor_identity [C, D]
            ⟹ post_composition_functor C D E F
              ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
            × post_composition_functor C E D G
              ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
              ⟹ functor_identity [C, E],
 form_adjunction (post_composition_functor C D E F)
   (post_composition_functor C E D G) (pr1 etaeps)
   (pr2 etaeps))
  (make_nat_trans (functor_identity [C, D])
     (post_composition_functor C D E F
      ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
     (((λ F' : functor_precategory_ob_mor C D,
        nat_trans_comp F'
          (functor_composite_data F' (F ∙ G))
          ((F' ∙ F) ∙ G)
          (nat_trans_comp F' (F' ∙ functor_identity D)
             (functor_composite_data F' (F ∙ G))
             (nat_trans_functor_id_right_inv F')
             (pre_whisker F' η))
          (nat_trans_functor_assoc_inv F' F G))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         (functor_identity_data
            (functor_precategory_data C D))
         (functor_composite_data
            (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)
            (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)))
      :
      nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C, D])
        (post_composition_functor C D E F
         ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G))
     is_left_adjoint_post_composition_functor_subproof,,
   make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor C E D G
      ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
     (functor_identity [C, E])
     (((λ F' : functor_precategory_ob_mor C E,
        nat_trans_comp ((F' ∙ G) ∙ F) (F' ∙ (G ∙ F))
          F' (nat_trans_functor_assoc F' G F)
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_composite_data F' (G ∙ F))
             (functor_composite_data F'
                (functor_identity E)) F'
             (pre_whisker F' ε)
             (nat_trans_functor_id_left F')))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         (functor_composite_data
            (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)
            (post_composition_functor_data C D E F))
         (functor_identity_data
            (functor_precategory_data C E)))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (post_composition_functor C E D G
         ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
        (functor_identity [C, E]))
     is_left_adjoint_post_composition_functor_subproof0)
 abstract (split; simpl; intro F';
              [ apply (nat_trans_eq E); simpl; intro c;
                now rewrite !id_left, !id_right; apply H1
              | apply (nat_trans_eq D); simpl; intro c;
                now rewrite !id_left, !id_right; apply H2]).
Defined.

End postcomp.

(** * Post-composition with a right adjoint is a right adjoint *)
Section postcomp_right.

Context {C D E : category}
        (F : functor D E) (HF : is_right_adjoint F).

Let G : functor E D := left_adjoint HF.
Let H : are_adjoints G F := pr2 HF.
Let ε : nat_trans (functor_composite F G) (functor_identity D) := counit_from_left_adjoint H.
Let η : nat_trans (functor_identity E) (functor_composite G F) := unit_from_left_adjoint H.
Let H1 : ∏ d : D, _ = identity (F d) := triangle_id_right_ad H.
Let H2 : ∏ e : E, _ = identity (G e) := triangle_id_left_ad H.


C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
is_right_adjoint (post_composition_functor C D E F)


C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
is_right_adjoint (post_composition_functor C D E F)

  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
are_adjoints (post_composition_functor C E D G)
  (post_composition_functor C D E F)

  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
functor_identity [C, E]
⟹ post_composition_functor C E D G
  ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
× post_composition_functor C D E F
  ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
  ⟹ functor_identity [C, D]
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
(λ etaeps : functor_identity [C, E]
            ⟹ post_composition_functor C E D G
              ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
            × post_composition_functor C D E F
              ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
              ⟹ functor_identity [C, D],
 form_adjunction (post_composition_functor C E D G)
   (post_composition_functor C D E F) (pr1 etaeps)
   (pr2 etaeps)) ?pr1

  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
functor_identity [C, E]
⟹ post_composition_functor C E D G
  ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
× post_composition_functor C D E F
  ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
  ⟹ functor_identity [C, D]

identity (G e)

⟹ post_composition_functor C E D G
  ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F

∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
⟹ functor_identity [C, D]

⟹ post_composition_functor C E D G
  ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E

unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)

# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C, E])
  (post_composition_functor C E D G
   ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F

· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =

# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
is_nat_trans (functor_identity [C, E])
  (post_composition_functor C E D G
   ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F) ?t

      
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D

· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =

# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =

nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C, E])
  (post_composition_functor C E D G
   ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
F': functor_precategory_ob_mor C E
functor_precategory_ob_mor C E
⟦ functor_identity_data (functor_precategory_data C E)
    F',
functor_composite_data
  (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)
  (post_composition_functor_data C D E F) F' ⟧
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
F': C ⟶ E
functor_precategory_ob_mor C E
⟦ functor_identity_data (functor_precategory_data C E)
    F',
functor_composite_data
  (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)
  (post_composition_functor_data C D E F) F' ⟧

        apply (nat_trans_comp _ _ _
                              (nat_trans_comp _ _ _ (nat_trans_functor_id_right_inv F')
                                              (pre_whisker F' η))
                              (nat_trans_functor_assoc_inv _ _ _)).
      
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
is_nat_trans (functor_identity [C, E])
  (post_composition_functor C E D G
   ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
  (((λ F' : functor_precategory_ob_mor C E,
     nat_trans_comp F'
       (functor_composite_data F' (G ∙ F))
       ((F' ∙ G) ∙ F)
       (nat_trans_comp F' (F' ∙ functor_identity E)
          (functor_composite_data F' (G ∙ F))
          (nat_trans_functor_id_right_inv F')
          (pre_whisker F' η))
       (nat_trans_functor_assoc_inv F' G F))
    :
    nat_trans_data
      (functor_identity_data
         (functor_precategory_data C E))
      (functor_composite_data
         (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)
         (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C, E])
     (post_composition_functor C E D G
      ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F))
 abstract (intros F1 F2 α; apply (nat_trans_eq E); intro c; simpl in *;
                    now rewrite !id_right, !id_left; apply (nat_trans_ax η (F1 c) _ (α c))).
    
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
post_composition_functor C D E F
∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
⟹ functor_identity [C, D]
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F

unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
nat_trans_data
  (post_composition_functor C D E F
   ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
  (functor_identity [C, D])

F: D ⟶ E

H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
is_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor C D E F
   ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
  (functor_identity [C, D]) ?t

      
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
nat_trans_data
  (post_composition_functor C D E F
   ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
  (functor_identity [C, D])
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
F': functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ functor_composite_data
    (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)
    (post_composition_functor_data C E D G) F',
functor_identity_data (functor_precategory_data C D)
  F' ⟧
 
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
F': C ⟶ D
functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ functor_composite_data
    (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)
    (post_composition_functor_data C E D G) F',
functor_identity_data (functor_precategory_data C D)
  F' ⟧

        apply (nat_trans_comp _ _ _
                              (nat_trans_functor_assoc _ _ _)
                              (nat_trans_comp _ _ _ (pre_whisker F' ε)
                                              (nat_trans_functor_id_left _))).
      
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
is_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor C D E F
   ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
  (functor_identity [C, D])
  (((λ F' : functor_precategory_ob_mor C D,
     nat_trans_comp ((F' ∙ F) ∙ G) (F' ∙ (F ∙ G)) F'
       (nat_trans_functor_assoc F' F G)
       (nat_trans_comp
          (functor_composite_data F' (F ∙ G))
          (functor_composite_data F'
             (functor_identity D)) F'
          (pre_whisker F' ε)
          (nat_trans_functor_id_left F')))
    :
    nat_trans_data
      (functor_composite_data
         (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)
         (post_composition_functor_data C E D G))
      (functor_identity_data
         (functor_precategory_data C D)))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (post_composition_functor C D E F
      ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
     (functor_identity [C, D]))
 abstract (intros F1 F2 α; apply (nat_trans_eq D); intro c; simpl in *;
                    now rewrite !id_right, !id_left; apply (nat_trans_ax ε _ _ (α c))).
  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_right_adjoint F
G:= left_adjoint HF: E ⟶ D
H:= pr2 HF: are_adjoints G F
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint H: F ∙ G ⟹ functor_identity D
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint H: functor_identity E ⟹ G ∙ F
H1:= triangle_id_right_ad H: ∏ d : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (F d)
· # F (counit_from_are_adjoints H d) =
identity (F d)
H2:= triangle_id_left_ad H: ∏ e : E,
# G (unit_from_are_adjoints H e)
· counit_from_are_adjoints H (G e) =
identity (G e)
(λ etaeps : functor_identity [C, E]
            ⟹ post_composition_functor C E D G
              ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F
            × post_composition_functor C D E F
              ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G
              ⟹ functor_identity [C, D],
 form_adjunction (post_composition_functor C E D G)
   (post_composition_functor C D E F) (pr1 etaeps)
   (pr2 etaeps))
  (make_nat_trans (functor_identity [C, E])
     (post_composition_functor C E D G
      ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F)
     (((λ F' : functor_precategory_ob_mor C E,
        nat_trans_comp F'
          (functor_composite_data F' (G ∙ F))
          ((F' ∙ G) ∙ F)
          (nat_trans_comp F' (F' ∙ functor_identity E)
             (functor_composite_data F' (G ∙ F))
             (nat_trans_functor_id_right_inv F')
             (pre_whisker F' η))
          (nat_trans_functor_assoc_inv F' G F))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         (functor_identity_data
            (functor_precategory_data C E))
         (functor_composite_data
            (post_composition_functor_data C E D G)
            (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)))
      :
      nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C, E])
        (post_composition_functor C E D G
         ∙ post_composition_functor C D E F))
     is_right_adjoint_post_composition_functor_subproof,,
   make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor C D E F
      ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
     (functor_identity [C, D])
     (((λ F' : functor_precategory_ob_mor C D,
        nat_trans_comp ((F' ∙ F) ∙ G) (F' ∙ (F ∙ G))
          F' (nat_trans_functor_assoc F' F G)
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_composite_data F' (F ∙ G))
             (functor_composite_data F'
                (functor_identity D)) F'
             (pre_whisker F' ε)
             (nat_trans_functor_id_left F')))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         (functor_composite_data
            (post_composition_functor_data C D E F)
            (post_composition_functor_data C E D G))
         (functor_identity_data
            (functor_precategory_data C D)))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (post_composition_functor C D E F
         ∙ post_composition_functor C E D G)
        (functor_identity [C, D]))
     is_right_adjoint_post_composition_functor_subproof0)
 abstract (split; simpl; intro F';
              [ apply (nat_trans_eq D); simpl; intro c;
                now rewrite !id_right, !id_left; apply H2
              | apply (nat_trans_eq E); simpl; intro c;
                now rewrite !id_left, !id_right; apply H1]).
Defined.

End postcomp_right.

End adjunctions.


Section HomSetIso_from_Adjunction.

  Context {C D : category} {F : functor C D} {G : functor D C} (H : are_adjoints F G).

  Let η := unit_from_are_adjoints H.
  Let ε := counit_from_are_adjoints H.

  (** * Definition of the maps on hom-types *)

  Definition φ_adj {A : C} {B : D} : F A --> B → A --> G B
    := λ f : F A --> B, η _ · #G f.

  Definition φ_adj_inv {A : C} {B : D} : A --> G B → F A --> B
    := λ g : A --> G B, #F g · ε _ .

  (** * Proof that those maps are inverse to each other *)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
φ_adj (φ_adj_inv g) = g

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
φ_adj (φ_adj_inv g) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
η A · # G (φ_adj_inv g) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
η A · # G (# F g · ε B) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
η A · # G (# F g · ε B) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
η A · (# G (# F g) · # G (ε B)) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
η A · # G (# F g) · # G (ε B) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
X2: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity C) f · η x' =
η x · # (F ∙ G) f
η A · # G (# F g) · # G (ε B) = g
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
X2: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f · η x' = η x · # G (# F f)
η A · # G (# F g) · # G (ε B) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
g · η (G B) · # G (ε B) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
g · (η (G B) · # G (ε B)) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
g · (η (G B) · # G (ε B)) = g · identity (G B)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
g · identity (G B) = g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
g · (η (G B) · # G (ε B)) = g · identity (G B)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
η (G B) · # G (ε B) = identity (G B)

      apply X'.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X': ∏ b : D,
unit_from_are_adjoints H (G b)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints H b) =
identity (G b)
g · identity (G B) = g
 apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
φ_adj_inv (φ_adj f) = f

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
φ_adj_inv (φ_adj f) = f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
# F (η A · # G f) · ε B = f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
# F (η A) · # F (# G f) · ε B = f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X2: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F (# G f) · ε x' = ε x · f
# F (η A) · # F (# G f) · ε B = f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X2: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F (# G f) · ε x' = ε x · f
# F (η A) · (# F (# G f) · ε B) = f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
# F (η A) · (ε (F A) · f) = f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
# F (η A) · ε (F A) · f = f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
# F (η A) · ε (F A) · f = identity (F A) · f
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
identity (F A) · f = f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
# F (η A) · ε (F A) · f = identity (F A) · f
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
# F (η A) · ε (F A) = identity (F A)

      apply triangle_id_left_ad.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_composite_data G F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
identity (F A) · f = f
 apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
φ_adj (identity (F A)) = η A

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
φ_adj (identity (F A)) = η A

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
η A · # G (identity (F A)) = η A
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
η A · identity (G (F A)) = η A

    apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
φ_adj_inv (η A) = identity (F (functor_identity C A))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
φ_adj_inv (η A) = identity (F (functor_identity C A))

    apply triangle_id_left_ad.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
isweq φ_adj

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
∏ x : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧, φ_adj_inv (φ_adj x) = x
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
∏ y : C ⟦ A, G B ⟧, φ_adj (φ_adj_inv y) = y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
∏ x : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧, φ_adj_inv (φ_adj x) = x
 apply φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
∏ y : C ⟦ A, G B ⟧, φ_adj (φ_adj_inv y) = y
 apply φ_adj_after_φ_adj_inv.
  Defined.

  (** * Proof of the equations (naturality squares) of the adjunction *)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
φ_adj (# F h · f) = h · φ_adj f

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
φ_adj (# F h · f) = h · φ_adj f

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
η X · # G (# F h · f) = h · (η A · # G f)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
η X · (# G (# F h) · # G f) = h · (η A · # G f)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
T:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f · η x' = η x · # G (# F f)
η X · (# G (# F h) · # G f) = h · (η A · # G f)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
T:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f · η x' = η x · # G (# F f)
η X · # G (# F h) · # G f = h · (η A · # G f)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
T:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f · η x' = η x · # G (# F f)
h · η A · # G f = h · (η A · # G f)

    apply pathsinv0, assoc.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints H: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
Y: D
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
φ_adj (f · k) = φ_adj f · # G k

G: D ⟶ C

G: D ⟶ C

A: C

Y: D

G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G

ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A: C
B: D
f: D ⟦ F A, B ⟧
Y: D
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
# G (f · k) = # G f · # G k

    apply (functor_comp G).
  Qed.

g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧

    apply pathsinv0, assoc.
  Qed.

# F (# G f) · ε x' = ε x · f
# F g · # F (# G k) · ε Y = # F g · ε B · k

# F (# G f) · ε x' = ε x · f
# F g · (# F (# G k) · ε Y) = # F g · ε B · k

G: D ⟶ C

Y: D
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
T:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F (# G f) · ε x' = ε x · f
# F g · (ε B · k) = # F g · ε B · k

    apply assoc.
  Qed.

G: D ⟶ C

B, Y: D

F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
