ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints H: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
A, X: C
B, Y: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
φ_adj_inv (h · g) = # F h · φ_adj_inv g

    apply φ_adj_inv_natural_precomp.
  Qed.

End HomSetIso_from_Adjunction.

Section HomSetIsoClosedUnderIso.

  Context {C C' : category}.
  Context (F F' : C ⟶ C').
  Context (G : C' ⟶ C).
  Context (α : z_iso (C := [C, C']) F F').
  Context (H : are_adjoints F G).
  Context (c : C).
  Context (c' : C').

  
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C' ⟦ F' c, c' ⟧
φ_adj (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso F F' G α H) f =
φ_adj H (((α : [C, C'] ⟦ F, F' ⟧) : F ⟹ F') c · f)

  
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C' ⟦ F' c, c' ⟧
φ_adj (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso F F' G α H) f =
φ_adj H (((α : [C, C'] ⟦ F, F' ⟧) : F ⟹ F') c · f)

    
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C' ⟦ F' c, c' ⟧
(pr11 H) c · (post_whisker (pr1 α) G c · # G f) =
φ_adj H (α c · f)

    
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C' ⟦ F' c, c' ⟧
post_whisker (pr1 α) G c · # G f = # G (α c · f)

    exact (!functor_comp G _ _).
  Qed.

  
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C ⟦ c, G c' ⟧
φ_adj_inv (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso F F' G α H) f =
((z_iso_inv α : [C, C'] ⟦ F', F ⟧) : F' ⟹ F) c
· φ_adj_inv H f

  
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C ⟦ c, G c' ⟧
φ_adj_inv (are_adjoints_closed_under_iso F F' G α H) f =
((z_iso_inv α : [C, C'] ⟦ F', F ⟧) : F' ⟹ F) c
· φ_adj_inv H f

    
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C ⟦ c, G c' ⟧
# F' f · pre_whisker G (inv_from_z_iso α) c'
· (pr21 H) c' = z_iso_inv α c · φ_adj_inv H f

    
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C ⟦ c, G c' ⟧
# F' f · pre_whisker G (inv_from_z_iso α) c'
· (pr21 H) c' =
z_iso_inv α c · # F f · counit_from_are_adjoints H c'

    
C, C': category
F, F': C ⟶ C'
G: C' ⟶ C
α: z_iso F F'
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
c': C'
f: C ⟦ c, G c' ⟧
# F' f · pre_whisker G (inv_from_z_iso α) c' =
z_iso_inv α c · # F f

    apply (nat_trans_ax (inv_from_z_iso α)).
  Qed.

End HomSetIsoClosedUnderIso.

Section HomSetIsoRightFromPartial.

  Context {X A : category}.
  Context (F : functor X A).
  Context (G0 : ob A -> ob X).
  Context (eps : ∏ a, A⟦F (G0 a),a⟧).
  Context (Huniv : ∏ a, is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)).
  Context (a : A).
  Context (x : X).

  Let G
    : A ⟶ X
    := G F G0 eps Huniv.

  Let Adj
    : are_adjoints F G
    := (unit _ _ _ Huniv ,, counit _ _ _ _) ,, form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv.

  (* Note that for f : X⟦x, G a⟧, we have φ_adj_inv Adj f = #F f · eps a definitionally *)

  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
x: X
G:= Core.G F G0 eps Huniv: A ⟶ X
Adj:= (unit F G0 eps Huniv,, counit F G0 eps Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: A ⟦ F x, a ⟧
φ_adj Adj f = pr11 (Huniv a x f)

  
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
x: X
G:= Core.G F G0 eps Huniv: A ⟶ X
Adj:= (unit F G0 eps Huniv,, counit F G0 eps Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: A ⟦ F x, a ⟧
φ_adj Adj f = pr11 (Huniv a x f)

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
x: X
G:= Core.G F G0 eps Huniv: A ⟶ X
Adj:= (unit F G0 eps Huniv,, counit F G0 eps Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: A ⟦ F x, a ⟧
# F
  ((pr22 X) (functor_identity X x) ((F ∙ G) x) (G a)
     (unit_from_are_adjoints Adj x) (# G f)) · eps a =
f

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
x: X
G:= Core.G F G0 eps Huniv: A ⟶ X
Adj:= (unit F G0 eps Huniv,, counit F G0 eps Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: A ⟦ F x, a ⟧
# F (unit_from_are_adjoints Adj x) · # F (# G f)
· eps a = f

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
x: X
G:= Core.G F G0 eps Huniv: A ⟶ X
Adj:= (unit F G0 eps Huniv,, counit F G0 eps Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: A ⟦ F x, a ⟧
# F (unit_from_are_adjoints Adj x)
· (# F (# G f) · eps a) = f

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
x: X
G:= Core.G F G0 eps Huniv: A ⟶ X
Adj:= (unit F G0 eps Huniv,, counit F G0 eps Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: A ⟦ F x, a ⟧
# F (unit_from_are_adjoints Adj x) · (eps (F x) · f) =
f

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
x: X
G:= Core.G F G0 eps Huniv: A ⟶ X
Adj:= (unit F G0 eps Huniv,, counit F G0 eps Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: A ⟦ F x, a ⟧
# F (unit_from_are_adjoints Adj x) · eps (F x) · f = f

    
X, A: category
F: X ⟶ A
G0: A → X
eps: ∏ a : A, A ⟦ F (G0 a), a ⟧
Huniv: ∏ a : A,
is_universal_arrow_from F a (G0 a) (eps a)
a: A
x: X
G:= Core.G F G0 eps Huniv: A ⟶ X
Adj:= (unit F G0 eps Huniv,, counit F G0 eps Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG F G0 eps Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: A ⟦ F x, a ⟧
identity (F x) · f = f

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

End HomSetIsoRightFromPartial.

Section HomSetIsoLeftFromPartial.

  Context {X A : category}.
  Context (G : functor A X).
  Context (F0 : ob X -> ob A).
  Context (eta : ∏ x, X⟦x, G (F0 x)⟧).
  Context (Huniv : ∏ x, is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)).
  Context (x : X).
  Context (a : A).

  Let F
    : X ⟶ A
    := left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv.

  Let Adj
    : are_adjoints F G
    := (unit_left_from_partial _ _ _ Huniv ,, counit_left_from_partial _ _ _ _) ,,
      form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv.

  (* Note that for f : A⟦F x, a⟧, we have φ_adj Adj f = eta x · #G f definitionally *)

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
a: A
F:= left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv: X ⟶ A
Adj:= (unit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv,,
 counit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta
  Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: X ⟦ x, G a ⟧
φ_adj_inv Adj f = pr11 (Huniv x a f)

  
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
a: A
F:= left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv: X ⟶ A
Adj:= (unit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv,,
 counit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta
  Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: X ⟦ x, G a ⟧
φ_adj_inv Adj f = pr11 (Huniv x a f)

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
a: A
F:= left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv: X ⟶ A
Adj:= (unit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv,,
 counit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta
  Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: X ⟦ x, G a ⟧
eta x
· # G
    ((pr22 A) (F x) (F (G a)) (functor_identity A a)
       (# F f) (counit_from_are_adjoints Adj a)) = f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
a: A
F:= left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv: X ⟶ A
Adj:= (unit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv,,
 counit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta
  Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: X ⟦ x, G a ⟧
eta x
· (# G (# F f) · # G (counit_from_are_adjoints Adj a)) =
f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
a: A
F:= left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv: X ⟶ A
Adj:= (unit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv,,
 counit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta
  Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: X ⟦ x, G a ⟧
eta x · # G (# F f)
· # G (counit_from_are_adjoints Adj a) = f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
a: A
F:= left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv: X ⟶ A
Adj:= (unit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv,,
 counit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta
  Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: X ⟦ x, G a ⟧
f · eta (G a) · # G (counit_from_are_adjoints Adj a) =
f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
a: A
F:= left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv: X ⟶ A
Adj:= (unit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv,,
 counit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta
  Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: X ⟦ x, G a ⟧
f · (eta (G a) · # G (counit_from_are_adjoints Adj a)) =
f

    
X, A: category
G: A ⟶ X
F0: X → A
eta: ∏ x : X, X ⟦ x, G (F0 x) ⟧
Huniv: ∏ x : X,
is_universal_arrow_to G x (F0 x) (eta x)
x: X
a: A
F:= left_adj_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv: X ⟶ A
Adj:= (unit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv,,
 counit_left_from_partial G F0 eta Huniv),,
form_adjunctionFG_left_from_partial G F0 eta
  Huniv: are_adjoints F G
f: X ⟦ x, G a ⟧
f · identity (G a) = f

    apply id_right.
  Qed.

End HomSetIsoLeftFromPartial.

(** * Adjunction defined from a natural isomorphism on homsets (F A --> B) ≃ (A --> G B) *)

Definition natural_hom_weq {C D : precategory} (F : functor C D) (G : functor D C) : UU
  := ∑ (hom_weq :  ∏ {A : C} {B : D}, F A --> B ≃ A --> G B),
       (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : F A --> B) (X : C) (h : X --> A),
        hom_weq (#F h · f) = h · hom_weq f) ×
       (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : F A --> B) (Y : D) (k : B --> Y),
        hom_weq (f · k) = hom_weq f · #G k).

Definition hom_weq {C D : precategory} {F : functor C D} {G : functor D C}
           (H : natural_hom_weq F G) : ∏ {A : C} {B : D}, F A --> B ≃ A --> G B := pr1 H.

Definition hom_natural_precomp {C D : precategory} {F : functor C D} {G : functor D C}
           (H : natural_hom_weq F G) : ∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : F A --> B) (X : C) (h : X --> A),
                       hom_weq H (#F h · f) = h · hom_weq H f := pr1 (pr2 H).

Definition hom_natural_postcomp {C D : precategory} {F : functor C D} { G : functor D C}
           (H : natural_hom_weq F G) : ∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : F A --> B) (Y : D) (k : B --> Y),
                       hom_weq H (f · k) = hom_weq H f · #G k := pr2 (pr2 H).

Section Adjunction_from_HomSetIso.

  Context {C D : category} {F : functor C D} {G : functor D C}
          (H : natural_hom_weq F G).

  Local Definition hom_inv : ∏ {A : C} {B : D}, A --> G B → F A --> B
    := λ A B, invmap (hom_weq H).

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
hom_inv (h · g) = # F h · hom_inv g

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
hom_inv (h · g) = # F h · hom_inv g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
hom_weq H (# F h · hom_inv g) = h · g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
h · hom_weq H (hom_inv g) = h · g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
X: C
h: C ⟦ X, A ⟧
hom_weq H (hom_inv g) = g

    apply homotweqinvweq.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
Y: D
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
hom_inv (g · # G k) = hom_inv g · k

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
Y: D
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
hom_inv (g · # G k) = hom_inv g · k

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
Y: D
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
hom_weq H (hom_inv g · k) = g · # G k

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
Y: D
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
hom_weq H (hom_inv g) · # G k = g · # G k

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A: C
B: D
g: C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
Y: D
k: D ⟦ B, Y ⟧
hom_weq H (hom_inv g) = g

    apply homotweqinvweq.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
nat_trans_data (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
is_nat_trans (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G) ?t

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
nat_trans_data (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
 exact (λ A, (hom_weq H (identity (F A)))).
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
is_nat_trans (functor_identity C) (F ∙ G)
  (λ A : C, hom_weq H (identity (F A)))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A, A': C
h: C ⟦ A, A' ⟧
# (functor_identity C) h · hom_weq H (identity (F A')) =
hom_weq H (identity (F A)) · # (F ∙ G) h
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A, A': C
h: C ⟦ A, A' ⟧
h · hom_weq H (identity (F A')) =
hom_weq H (identity (F A)) · # G (# F h)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A, A': C
h: C ⟦ A, A' ⟧
hom_weq H (# F h · identity (F A')) =
hom_weq H (identity (F A)) · # G (# F h)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A, A': C
h: C ⟦ A, A' ⟧
hom_weq H (# F h · identity (F A')) =
hom_weq H (identity (F A) · # F h)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A, A': C
h: C ⟦ A, A' ⟧
# F h · identity (F A') = identity (F A) · # F h

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
A, A': C
h: C ⟦ A, A' ⟧
# F h · identity (F A') = # F h

      apply id_right.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
is_nat_trans (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D) ?t

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
nat_trans_data (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
 exact (λ B, hom_inv (identity (G B))).
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
is_nat_trans (G ∙ F) (functor_identity D)
  (λ B : D, hom_inv (identity (G B)))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
B, B': D
k: D ⟦ B, B' ⟧
# (G ∙ F) k · hom_inv (identity (G B')) =
hom_inv (identity (G B)) · # (functor_identity D) k
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
B, B': D
k: D ⟦ B, B' ⟧
# F (# G k) · hom_inv (identity (G B')) =
hom_inv (identity (G B)) · k

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
B, B': D
k: D ⟦ B, B' ⟧
# F (# G k) · hom_inv (identity (G B')) =
hom_inv (identity (G B) · # G k)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
B, B': D
k: D ⟦ B, B' ⟧
hom_inv (# G k · identity (G B')) =
hom_inv (identity (G B) · # G k)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
B, B': D
k: D ⟦ B, B' ⟧
# G k · identity (G B') = identity (G B) · # G k

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
B, B': D
k: D ⟦ B, B' ⟧
# G k · identity (G B') = # G k

      apply id_right.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
are_adjoints F G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
are_adjoints F G

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
form_adjunction F G unit_from_hom counit_from_hom

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
triangle_1_statement
  (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
triangle_2_statement
  (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
triangle_1_statement
  (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
a: C
# (left_functor
     (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom))
  (adjunit (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom) a)
· adjcounit (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom)
    (left_functor
       (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom) a) =
identity
  (left_functor
     (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom) a)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
a: C
# F (hom_weq H (identity (F a)))
· hom_inv (identity (G (F a))) = identity (F a)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
a: C
hom_inv
  (hom_weq H (identity (F a)) · identity (G (F a))) =
identity (F a)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
a: C
hom_inv (hom_weq H (identity (F a))) = identity (F a)

      apply homotinvweqweq.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
triangle_2_statement
  (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
b: D
adjunit (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom)
  (right_functor
     (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom) b)
· # (right_functor
       (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom))
    (adjcounit
       (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom) b) =
identity
  (right_functor
     (F,, G,, unit_from_hom,, counit_from_hom) b)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
b: D
hom_weq H (identity (F (G b)))
· # G (hom_inv (identity (G b))) = identity (G b)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
b: D
hom_weq H
  (identity (F (G b)) · hom_inv (identity (G b))) =
identity (G b)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
b: D
hom_weq H (hom_inv (identity (G b))) = identity (G b)

      apply homotweqinvweq.
  Defined.

End Adjunction_from_HomSetIso.


(** * Weak equivalence between adjunctions F -| G and natural weqs of homsets (F A --> B) ≃ (A --> G B) *)

Section Adjunction_HomSetIso_weq.

  Context {C D : category} {F : functor C D} {G : functor D C}.

  Definition nathomweq_from_adj : (are_adjoints F G) → (natural_hom_weq F G)
    := λ H, (adjunction_hom_weq H,, (φ_adj_natural_precomp H,, φ_adj_natural_postcomp H)).

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
adj_from_nathomweq (nathomweq_from_adj H) = H

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
adj_from_nathomweq (nathomweq_from_adj H) = H

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
isPredicate
  (λ x : functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
         × G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D,
   form_adjunction F G (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
pr1 (adj_from_nathomweq (nathomweq_from_adj H)) =
pr1 H

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
isPredicate
  (λ x : functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
         × G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D,
   form_adjunction F G (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
x: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
× G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
isaprop (form_adjunction F G (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
 apply isaprop_form_adjunction.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
pr1 (adj_from_nathomweq (nathomweq_from_adj H)) =
pr1 H
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
unit_from_hom (nathomweq_from_adj H) = pr11 H
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
counit_from_hom (nathomweq_from_adj H) = pr21 H

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
unit_from_hom (nathomweq_from_adj H) = pr11 H
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
∏ x : C,
unit_from_hom (nathomweq_from_adj H) x = (pr11 H) x

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
unit_from_hom (nathomweq_from_adj H) c = (pr11 H) c
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
φ_adj H (identity (F c)) = (pr11 H) c

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
(pr11 H) c · # G (identity (F c)) = (pr11 H) c

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
c: C
(pr11 H) c · identity (G (F c)) = (pr11 H) c

        apply id_right.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
counit_from_hom (nathomweq_from_adj H) = pr21 H
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
∏ x : D,
counit_from_hom (nathomweq_from_adj H) x = (pr21 H) x

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
d: D
counit_from_hom (nathomweq_from_adj H) d = (pr21 H) d
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
d: D
φ_adj_inv H (identity (G d)) = (pr21 H) d

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
d: D
# F (identity (G d)) · (pr21 H) d = (pr21 H) d

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: are_adjoints F G
d: D
identity (F (G d)) · (pr21 H) d = (pr21 H) d

        apply id_left.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
nathomweq_from_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H) = H

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
nathomweq_from_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H) = H

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ (A : C) (B : D),
         D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧,
   (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (X : C)
    (h : C ⟦ X, A ⟧), x X B (# F h · f) = h · x A B f)
   × (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (Y : D)
      (k : D ⟦ B, Y ⟧),
      x A Y (f · k) = x A B f · # G k))
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
pr1 (nathomweq_from_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H)) =
pr1 H

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∏ (A : C) (B : D),
         D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧,
   (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (X : C)
    (h : C ⟦ X, A ⟧), x X B (# F h · f) = h · x A B f)
   × (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (Y : D)
      (k : D ⟦ B, Y ⟧),
      x A Y (f · k) = x A B f · # G k))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
p: ∏ (A : C) (B : D), D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
isaprop
  ((∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (X : C)
    (h : C ⟦ X, A ⟧), p X B (# F h · f) = h · p A B f)
   × (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (Y : D)
      (k : D ⟦ B, Y ⟧),
      p A Y (f · k) = p A B f · # G k))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
p: ∏ (A : C) (B : D), D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
isaprop
  (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (X : C)
   (h : C ⟦ X, A ⟧), p X B (# F h · f) = h · p A B f)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
p: ∏ (A : C) (B : D), D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
isaprop
  (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (Y : D)
   (k : D ⟦ B, Y ⟧), p A Y (f · k) = p A B f · # G k)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
p: ∏ (A : C) (B : D), D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
isaprop
  (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (X : C)
   (h : C ⟦ X, A ⟧), p X B (# F h · f) = h · p A B f)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
p: ∏ (A : C) (B : D), D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
t: C
t0: D
t1: D ⟦ F t, t0 ⟧
t2: C
t3: C ⟦ t2, t ⟧
isaprop (p t2 t0 (# F t3 · t1) = t3 · p t t0 t1)

        apply C.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
p: ∏ (A : C) (B : D), D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
isaprop
  (∏ (A : C) (B : D) (f : D ⟦ F A, B ⟧) (Y : D)
   (k : D ⟦ B, Y ⟧), p A Y (f · k) = p A B f · # G k)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
p: ∏ (A : C) (B : D), D ⟦ F A, B ⟧ ≃ C ⟦ A, G B ⟧
t: C
t0: D
t1: D ⟦ F t, t0 ⟧
t2: D
t3: D ⟦ t0, t2 ⟧
isaprop (p t t2 (t1 · t3) = p t t0 t1 · # G t3)

        apply C.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
pr1 (nathomweq_from_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H)) =
pr1 H
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
adjunction_hom_weq (adj_from_nathomweq H) = pr1 H

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
(λ (A : C) (B : D),
 φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H),,
 isweq_iso (φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H))
   (φ_adj_inv (adj_from_nathomweq H))
   (φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H))
   (φ_adj_after_φ_adj_inv (adj_from_nathomweq H))) =
pr1 H

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H),,
isweq_iso (φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H))
  (φ_adj_inv (adj_from_nathomweq H))
  (φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H))
  (φ_adj_after_φ_adj_inv (adj_from_nathomweq H)) =
pr1 H x x0

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
isPredicate isweq
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
pr1
  (φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H),,
   isweq_iso (φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H))
     (φ_adj_inv (adj_from_nathomweq H))
     (φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H))
     (φ_adj_after_φ_adj_inv (adj_from_nathomweq H))) =
pr1 (pr1 H x x0)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
isPredicate isweq
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
x1: D ⟦ F x, x0 ⟧ → C ⟦ x, G x0 ⟧
isaprop (isweq x1)
 apply isapropisweq.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
pr1
  (φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H),,
   isweq_iso (φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H))
     (φ_adj_inv (adj_from_nathomweq H))
     (φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H))
     (φ_adj_after_φ_adj_inv (adj_from_nathomweq H))) =
pr1 (pr1 H x x0)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
φ_adj (adj_from_nathomweq H) = pr1 (pr1 H x x0)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
(λ f : D ⟦ F x, x0 ⟧,
 unit_from_are_adjoints
   (make_are_adjoints F G (unit_from_hom H)
      (counit_from_hom H)
      (make_dirprod
         (λ a : C,
          internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
            (hom_inv H
               (hom_weq H (identity (F a))
                · identity (G (F a))))
            (λ p : D ⟦ F a, F a ⟧, p = identity (F a))
            (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, G (F a) ⟧)
               (hom_weq H (identity (F a))
                · identity (G (F a)))
               (hom_weq H (identity (F a)))
               (λ p : C ⟦ a, G (F a) ⟧,
                hom_inv H p = identity (F a))
               (homotinvweqweq (hom_weq H)
                  (identity (F a)))
               (id_right (hom_weq H (identity (F a)))))
            (# F (hom_weq H (identity (F a)))
             · hom_inv H (identity (G (F a))))
            (inv_natural_precomp H
               (identity (G (F a)))
               (hom_weq H (identity (F a)))))
         (λ b : D,
          internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ G b, G b ⟧)
            (hom_weq H
               (identity (F (G b))
                · hom_inv H (identity (G b))))
            (λ p : C ⟦ G b, G b ⟧, p = identity (G b))
            (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F (G b), b ⟧)
               (identity (F (G b))
                · hom_inv H (identity (G b)))
               (hom_inv H (identity (G b)))
               (λ p : D ⟦ F (G b), b ⟧,
                hom_weq H p = identity (G b))
               (homotweqinvweq (hom_weq H)
                  (identity (G b)))
               (id_left (hom_inv H (identity (G b)))))
            (hom_weq H (identity (F (G b)))
             · # G (hom_inv H (identity (G b))))
            (hom_natural_postcomp H (G b) (F (G b))
               (identity (F (G b))) b
               (hom_inv H (identity (G b))))))) x
 · # G f) = pr1 (pr1 H x x0)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
(λ f : D ⟦ F x, x0 ⟧,
 hom_weq H (identity (F x)) · # G f) =
pr1 (pr1 H x x0)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
(λ f : D ⟦ F x, x0 ⟧,
 hom_weq H (identity (F x)) · # G f) ~
pr1 (pr1 H x x0)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
f: D ⟦ F x, x0 ⟧
hom_weq H (identity (F x)) · # G f =
pr1 (pr1 H x x0) f

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
f: D ⟦ F x, x0 ⟧
hom_weq H (identity (F x) · f) = pr1 (pr1 H x x0) f

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
H: natural_hom_weq F G
x: C
x0: D
f: D ⟦ F x, x0 ⟧
identity (F x) · f = f

        apply id_left.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are_adjoints F G ≃ natural_hom_weq F G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are_adjoints F G ≃ natural_hom_weq F G

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
isweq nathomweq_from_adj

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
∏ x : are_adjoints F G,
adj_from_nathomweq (nathomweq_from_adj x) = x
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
∏ y : natural_hom_weq F G,
nathomweq_from_adj (adj_from_nathomweq y) = y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
∏ x : are_adjoints F G,
adj_from_nathomweq (nathomweq_from_adj x) = x
 apply adj_after_nathomweq.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
∏ y : natural_hom_weq F G,
nathomweq_from_adj (adj_from_nathomweq y) = y
 apply nathomweq_after_adj.
  Defined.

End Adjunction_HomSetIso_weq.

Section RelativeAdjunction_by_natural_hom_weq.

(** this definition is according to Altenkirch, Chapman and Uustalu
Reference: % \cite{DBLP:journals/corr/AltenkirchCU14} \par %
*)

Definition are_relative_adjoints {I: precategory_data} {C D: precategory_data}
  (J: functor_data I C) (L: functor_data I D) (R: functor_data D C) : UU
  :=  ∑ (hom_weq :  ∏ {X : I} {Y : D}, L X --> Y ≃ J X --> R Y),
       (∏ (Y : I) (Z : D) (f : L Y --> Z) (X : I) (h : X --> Y),
        hom_weq (#L h · f) = #J h · hom_weq f) ×
       (∏ (X : I) (Y : D) (f : L X --> Y) (Z : D) (k : Y --> Z),
        hom_weq (f · k) = hom_weq f · #R k).

(** the notion is a proper generalization of one of the criteria for being an adjunction *)

C, D: precategory
L: C ⟶ D
R: D ⟶ C
are_relative_adjoints (functor_identity C) L R =
natural_hom_weq L R


C, D: precategory
L: C ⟶ D
R: D ⟶ C
are_relative_adjoints (functor_identity C) L R =
natural_hom_weq L R

  apply idpath.
Qed.

End RelativeAdjunction_by_natural_hom_weq.

(** ** Lemmas about adjunctions *)

Section AdjunctionLemmas.
  Context {C D : category} {F : functor C D} {G : functor D C}.
  Context (are : are_adjoints F G).

  Let η : nat_trans (functor_identity C) (functor_composite F G) := unit_from_left_adjoint are.
  Let ε : nat_trans (functor_composite G F) (functor_identity D) := counit_from_left_adjoint are.

  (* Pre- and post- whiskering while treating functors/natural transformations as
     elements of functor categories. *)
  Let pre_whisker_functor_cat {a b c : category} {f g : functor b c}
      (h : functor a b) (n : [b, c]⟦f, g⟧) :
    [a, c]⟦functor_composite h f, functor_composite h g⟧ := pre_whisker h n.
  Let post_whisker_functor_cat {a b c : category} {f g : functor a b}
      (n : [a, b]⟦f, g⟧) (h : functor b c) :
    [a, c]⟦functor_composite f h, functor_composite g h⟧ := post_whisker n h.

  Let Fη := post_whisker_functor_cat η F.
  Let εF := pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε.
  Let ηG := pre_whisker_functor_cat G η.
  Let Gε := post_whisker_functor_cat ε G.

  (* Rephrase in terms of functor category objects/arrows *)
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
Fη · εF = identity (F : [C, D])

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
Fη · εF = identity (F : [C, D])

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ x : C, (Fη · εF) x = identity F x

    intro; apply triangle_id_left_ad.
  Qed.

  (* Rephrase in terms of functor category objects/arrows *)
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
ηG · Gε = identity (G : [D, C])

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
ηG · Gε = identity (G : [D, C])

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ x : D, (ηG · Gε) x = identity G x

    intro; apply triangle_id_right_ad.
  Qed.

  (* Rephrase in terms of functor category objects/arrows *)
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ x : D, isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ x : D, isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: D
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: D
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (ηG · Gε) x)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: D
is0: isEpi
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (ηG · Gε) x)
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: D
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (ηG · Gε) x)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: D
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (identity G) x)

      apply identity_isEpi.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: D
is0: isEpi
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (ηG · Gε) x)
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x)

    apply (isEpi_precomp _ _ _ is0).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
isEpi Gε

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
isEpi Gε

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ a : D, isEpi (pr1 Gε a)

    apply is_epi_post_whisker_right_adjoint_counit_pointwise.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ x : D, isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans ηG x)

F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: D
isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (identity G) x)

      apply identity_isMonic.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: D
is0: isMonic
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (ηG · Gε) x)
isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans ηG x)

    apply (isMonic_postcomp _ _ _ is0).
  Qed.

are: are_adjoints F G

pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ a : D, isMonic (pr1 ηG a)

    apply is_monic_pre_whisker_right_adjoint_unit_pointwise.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ x : C, isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans εF x)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ x : C, isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans εF x)

are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),

→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)

Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans εF x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (Fη · εF) x)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
is0: isEpi
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (Fη · εF) x)
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans εF x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D

are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)

pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)

Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (identity F) x)

      apply identity_isEpi.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
is0: isEpi
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (Fη · εF) x)
isEpi (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans εF x)

    apply (isEpi_precomp _ _ _ is0).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)

→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧

Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
isEpi εF

G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)

    apply is_epi_pre_whisker_left_adjoint_counit_pointwise.

are: are_adjoints F G

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)

ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ x : C, isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Fη x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Fη x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (Fη · εF) x)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
is0: isMonic
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (Fη · εF) x)
isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Fη x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (Fη · εF) x)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (identity F) x)

      apply identity_isMonic.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
x: C
is0: isMonic
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (Fη · εF) x)
isMonic (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Fη x)

    apply (isMonic_postcomp _ _ _ is0).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
isMonic Fη

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
∏ a : C, isMonic (pr1 Fη a)

    apply is_monic_post_whisker_left_adjoint_unit_pointwise.
  Qed.

  (** Riehl, "Category Theory in Context", Lemma 4.5.13(i)/Exercise 4.5.vi *)
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithful G → ∏ x : D, isEpi (ε x)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithful G → ∏ x : D, isEpi (ε x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithfulG: faithful G
∏ x : D, isEpi (ε x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithfulG: faithful G
x, y: D
f, g: D ⟦ functor_identity D x, y ⟧
H: ε x · f = ε x · g
f = g


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithfulG: faithful G
x, y: D
f, g: D ⟦ functor_identity D x, y ⟧
H: ε x · f = ε x · g
isInjective # G
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithfulG: faithful G
x, y: D
f, g: D ⟦ functor_identity D x, y ⟧
H: ε x · f = ε x · g
# G f = # G g

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,

Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithfulG: faithful G
x, y: D
f, g: D ⟦ functor_identity D x, y ⟧
H: ε x · f = ε x · g
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x · # G f =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x · # G g

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithfulG: faithful G
x, y: D
f, g: D ⟦ functor_identity D x, y ⟧
H: # G (ε x · f) = # G (ε x · g)
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x · # G f =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x · # G g

F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,

Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
faithfulG: faithful G
x, y: D
f, g: D ⟦ functor_identity D x, y ⟧
H: # G (ε x) · # G f = # G (ε x) · # G g
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x · # G f =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans Gε x · # G g

      assumption.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
A, B, E: UU
f: A → B
w: B ≃ E
issurjective (w ∘ f)%functions → issurjective f
