  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
A, B, E: UU
f: A → B
w: B ≃ E
b: B
iss: ∥ hfiber (w ∘ f)%functions (w b) ∥
hfiber (w ∘ f)%functions (w b) → ∥ hfiber f b ∥

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
A, B, E: UU
f: A → B
w: B ≃ E
b: B
iss: ∥ hfiber (w ∘ f)%functions (w b) ∥
a: hfiber (w ∘ f)%functions (w b)
hfiber f b

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
A, B, E: UU
f: A → B
w: B ≃ E
b: B
iss: ∥ hfiber (w ∘ f)%functions (w b) ∥
a: hfiber (w ∘ f)%functions (w b)
f (hfiberpr1 (w ∘ f)%functions (w b) a) = b

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
A, B, E: UU
f: A → B
w: B ≃ E
b: B
iss: ∥ hfiber (w ∘ f)%functions (w b) ∥
a: hfiber (w ∘ f)%functions (w b)
w (f (hfiberpr1 (w ∘ f)%functions (w b) a)) = w b

    apply (hfiberpr2 _ _ a).
  Qed.

  (** Riehl, "Category Theory in Context", Lemma 4.5.13(ii)/Exercise 4.5.vi

      Proof appears on the nLab (§ Basic properties):
      http://ncatlab.org/nlab/revision/adjoint%20functor/87
   *)
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
full G → ∏ x : D, is_merely_split_monic (ε x)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
full G → ∏ x : D, is_merely_split_monic (ε x)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
is_merely_split_monic (ε x)


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
is_merely_split_monic (ε x)


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
∏ c : D, issurjective (pcw c)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
c: D
issurjective (pcw c)


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
c: D
issurjective
  (hom_weq (nathomweq_from_adj are)
   ∘ precomp_with (ε x))%functions


    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
c: D
(hom_weq (nathomweq_from_adj are) ∘ pcw c)%functions =
# G
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
c: D
E: (hom_weq (nathomweq_from_adj are) ∘ pcw c)%functions =
# G
issurjective
  (hom_weq (nathomweq_from_adj are)
   ∘ precomp_with (ε x))%functions

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
c: D
(hom_weq (nathomweq_from_adj are) ∘ pcw c)%functions =
# G

F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G

issurjective
  (φ_adj are ∘ precomp_with (ε x))%functions

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
c: D
E: (φ_adj are ∘ precomp_with (ε x))%functions = # G
X: issurjective # G
issurjective
  (φ_adj are ∘ precomp_with (ε x))%functions

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
c: D
E: (φ_adj are ∘ precomp_with (ε x))%functions = # G
X: issurjective # G
issurjective # G

      assumption.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fullG: full G
x: D
pcw:= λ c : D, precomp_with (ε x): ∏ c : D,
D ⟦ functor_identity D x, c ⟧
→ D ⟦ (G ∙ F) x, c ⟧
c: D
E: (hom_weq (nathomweq_from_adj are) ∘ pcw c)%functions =
# G
issurjective # G
 apply fullG.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
fully_faithful G → ∏ x : D, is_z_isomorphism (ε x)

are: are_adjoints F G

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)

Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧

x: D
is_merely_split_monic (ε x)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D

(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),

→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧

F: C ⟶ D

are: are_adjoints F G

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
X: fully_faithful G
x: D
full G

      apply fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful; assumption.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
X: fully_faithful G
x: D
isEpi (ε x)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ C
are: are_adjoints F G
η:= unit_from_left_adjoint are: functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ G
ε:= counit_from_left_adjoint are: G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
pre_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b)
(n : [b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧),
pre_whisker h n: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : b ⟶ c) (h : a ⟶ b),
[b, c] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ [a, c] ⟦ h ∙ f, h ∙ g ⟧
post_whisker_functor_cat:= λ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b)
(n : [a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧)
(h : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker n h: ∏ (a b c : category)
(f g : a ⟶ b),
[a, b] ⟦ f, g ⟧
→ ∏ h : b ⟶ c,
  [a, c] ⟦ f ∙ h, g ∙ h ⟧
Fη:= post_whisker_functor_cat η F: [C, D] ⟦ functor_identity C ∙ F, (F ∙ G) ∙ F ⟧
εF:= pre_whisker_functor_cat F ε: [C, D] ⟦ F ∙ (G ∙ F), F ∙ functor_identity D ⟧
ηG:= pre_whisker_functor_cat G η: [D, C] ⟦ G ∙ functor_identity C, G ∙ (F ∙ G) ⟧
Gε:= post_whisker_functor_cat ε G: [D, C] ⟦ (G ∙ F) ∙ G, functor_identity D ∙ G ⟧
X: fully_faithful G
x: D
faithful G

      apply fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful; assumption.
  Qed.

End AdjunctionLemmas.

(** More builders for adjunctions *)

C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
adjunction C₁ C₂


C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
adjunction C₁ C₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
adjunction_data C₁ C₂
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
form_adjunction' ?adjData

  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
adjunction_data C₁ C₂
 
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
C₁ ⟶ C₂
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
C₂ ⟶ C₁
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
functor_identity C₁ ⟹ ?F ∙ ?G
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
?G ∙ ?F ⟹ functor_identity C₂

    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
C₁ ⟶ C₂
 exact L.
    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
C₂ ⟶ C₁
 exact (right_adjoint HL).
    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
functor_identity C₁ ⟹ L ∙ right_adjoint HL
 exact (adjunit HL).
    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
right_adjoint HL ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C₂
 exact (adjcounit HL).
  
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
form_adjunction'
  (make_adjunction_data L (right_adjoint HL)
     (adjunit HL) (adjcounit HL))
 
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
triangle_1_statement
  (make_adjunction_data L (right_adjoint HL)
     (adjunit HL) (adjcounit HL))
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
triangle_2_statement
  (make_adjunction_data L (right_adjoint HL)
     (adjunit HL) (adjcounit HL))

    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
triangle_1_statement
  (make_adjunction_data L (right_adjoint HL)
     (adjunit HL) (adjcounit HL))
 exact (pr122 HL).
    
C₁, C₂: category
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: is_left_adjoint L
triangle_2_statement
  (make_adjunction_data L (right_adjoint HL)
     (adjunit HL) (adjcounit HL))
 exact (pr222 HL).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
R: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HR: is_right_adjoint R
adjunction C₂ C₁

HR: is_right_adjoint R
adjunction C₂ C₁

HR: is_right_adjoint R
form_adjunction' ?adjData

R: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HR: is_right_adjoint R
?G ∙ ?F ⟹ functor_identity C₁

    
C₁, C₂: category
R: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HR: is_right_adjoint R
C₂ ⟶ C₁
 exact (left_adjoint HR).
    
C₁, C₂: category
R: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HR: is_right_adjoint R
C₁ ⟶ C₂
 exact R.
    
C₁, C₂: category
R: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HR: is_right_adjoint R
functor_identity C₂ ⟹ left_adjoint HR ∙ R
 exact (adjunit (pr2 HR)).
    
C₁, C₂: category
R: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HR: is_right_adjoint R
R ∙ left_adjoint HR ⟹ functor_identity C₁
 exact (adjcounit (pr2 HR)).
  
C₁, C₂: category
R: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HR: is_right_adjoint R
form_adjunction'
  (make_adjunction_data (left_adjoint HR) R
     (adjunit (pr2 HR)) (adjcounit (pr2 HR)))

HR: is_right_adjoint R
triangle_1_statement
  (make_adjunction_data (left_adjoint HR) R
     (adjunit (pr2 HR)) (adjcounit (pr2 HR)))

  (make_adjunction_data (left_adjoint HR) R
     (adjunit (pr2 HR)) (adjcounit (pr2 HR)))

  (make_adjunction_data (left_adjoint HR) R
     (adjunit (pr2 HR)) (adjcounit (pr2 HR)))
 exact (pr122 HR).
    
C₁, C₂: category
R: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HR: is_right_adjoint R
triangle_2_statement
  (make_adjunction_data (left_adjoint HR) R
     (adjunit (pr2 HR)) (adjcounit (pr2 HR)))
 exact (pr222 HR).
Defined.
